name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Hunt for Congress Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Summer is in full swing and we are charging head-on towards November. I am pleased with the positive strides our campaign is making and I look forward to continuing our fight to bring better leadership and representation to Houston.

On Tuesday, I was honored to receive Council Member Henry Folloder's endorsement. I look forward to working with local leaders like Council Member Folloder to give TX-07 residents a voice and ensure that their needs are represented in Washington. Thank you for your support, Council Member Folloder!

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e162f387a7f64592a02140be46d42554&_e=HzJpyyEzO5nLJyuAKmgc5_kHk93ivxcvp5gvkVLjXdUHazxGuCtaRDiFHlGVYzQ8LSpgysUxUeLETkWmFpd3oAVyTU7NtqCSNC3AFp6AjDhpvUfRYdHAtKr9RXbcKHrJMjxQNjotN8sTLtiAuKfXIN7sQ3RegePWSQQ8CJFCMc8rQTwStNV7m4DimOqJJQkCTFKBjQkhN5RNJRf9De7g--zA0Q8W9f8uc2QqidPTM7vRNwzckE7dKNm_s2Xyyi6Edr8SmlKxfmLV0oyrXzbUTzHM9KrcN4mlVwhlcp08N3TXE3L97_b4l-wPgYCnf7yq)

On Wednesday morning, I joined Fox and Friends to discuss the harmful consequences of Vice President Biden's proposed climate plan. Biden's plan would be devastating for Houston energy workers and the hardworking folks in TX-07 deserve an advocate at the federal level who will defend their interests.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e162f387a7f64592a02140be46d42554&_e=HzJpyyEzO5nLJyuAKmgc5_kHk93ivxcvp5gvkVLjXdUHazxGuCtaRDiFHlGVYzQ8grQA6T3EXS9YjZjXvs1qee9wreQFBMyEB0lfssc_-k5_2uTJtlybj4PznHqJTaBbLI88snYqhfw6aWE3b5VMhHeoxyaNr8eE5AD_hr1ZeRkATo4_IC9N-zegEO_WySRmO5jVMIwJ3GXR1bwj9-6ldH05Y96VbbmwXqltnGwL0gAJB_wnscrjZ8pjg0vmnm1yAbairPkDxD76JSb_Jxo4Tce6Xsgl_Gw3GhzBBGKjJwtrUfzGSNfNLQh5eg5kFYHB)

On Wednesday afternoon, I joined a great group of Team Hunt interns to volunteer at the Houston Food Bank. The coronavirus has brought new challenges for many families; we must remember to look out for the vulnerable members of our community and give back when we can.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e162f387a7f64592a02140be46d42554&_e=HzJpyyEzO5nLJyuAKmgc5_kHk93ivxcvp5gvkVLjXdUHazxGuCtaRDiFHlGVYzQ8SXwEXtVa3FaxdfOM37yGlCJMK2IM_640ZzcXnInCSLku2JpMXjpsbNSYoxQ_WW6X076wtxLdrvc4gFtY1_-w1HN7KRUggNt5_HnqeYQPQM-vDsq5Jr1XPW7hYAYzkKQUHeYJaseKEnJXRdRKI0zMFC8aDEelPXONHHPKvpZwPqtckPNlmMk8o8vAeg3M7BDyuomucL8X8Vn5n3wSnsAqVN2p5Uyh4fWp7q9LXB7ZI2z6ZjHmNtH7pjnakVhm2UYW)

On Thursday, I released my latest "Ask Wes" video, where I answered a question from Michael in Cypress concerning calls to defund the police. I strongly oppose efforts to defund the police and believe we should be working with the brave men and women of our law enforcement to build trust and safety in our communities.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e162f387a7f64592a02140be46d42554&_e=HzJpyyEzO5nLJyuAKmgc5_kHk93ivxcvp5gvkVLjXdUHazxGuCtaRDiFHlGVYzQ8j5nb09KbMstYgdH7nNrsiRFSuH6aoVf4YCqt5xtxWuxSoG8D-qHpaB28YlZk5yCTQdiddRRgDv5gJ0Y_NDXuRoUA9Bzzt5oqH5Xu08cOlJ4LRVYCkR0frnp-Y9A2_AnfTMikJYzvgKC0df0BWpLFoVNdg9rV46hQ3VeWIaqLXzXPSHjHjKF-Gupw4pNQlhqUVw85_CIa_7Mnw8_U9kJdEYUPOAgG8C-NPhEP2ufd-l7RxsbvPSR_22h9Mb4YQlrx)

ICYMI: Earlier this week, Vice President Joe Biden introduced his climate plan, which aims to completely uproot our existing energy industry and replace it with a highly regulated, federally-directed climate agenda. You can find my views on this dangerous and destructive plan [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e162f387a7f64592a02140be46d42554&_e=HzJpyyEzO5nLJyuAKmgc5z6Z9JE6HZ8P7vLLFEQlpEAatm7Rj3aelMsbQnDd9Du4cvsCJsHTFMY1o7j8KHmL4S3qTA0CKPaQ94zcOHBWjkwi2C4gHpGhSbgpGbaHYZkBvmAK1eDWE0bOnrJ3M1XtFizXYmqtWbNlsLuZ9292WOhQ1sGGeursSJqI3HhGuhvuXYBxjJ3aeTvybYxnhnEIhxpkAaOecDAJEsV6qJHoKVSxWI7pWsYowVtSowxnyyNfQudRZipT_kGaHKqUiycdoTX3m8_Gdef2rCQRTBQXukjX3NAgyr2oxD-9bQg17RyxguYKf_b9yPYtL8ECOo_lkQ%3D%3D).

Election day is growing closer and I am energized and encouraged by the ground my campaign has covered and the direction we're heading. Our progress would not be possible without your help and support. Thank you for joining us as we fight to bring conservative leadership back to the 7th District.

Thank you,
Wesley

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e162f387a7f64592a02140be46d42554&_e=HzJpyyEzO5nLJyuAKmgc5yP6Y8nP-fpC_EHJnbleWpDot6UYp8zC1H1tvVNYfmiKoABO_OdTTOFQEJzqu-FbjjeC06Oix9XTXcMWsYLEuXyRrCltbRBbZusZ92Z71wu4tHtXSoP3h3b-3EZNg8eYIJZoKV2tvm5oWLS-irNMGFwtna5M8gwDlFgt3sLHFy2-gVZyYAZl0O_rB0F9FznVfj9ZbnE-YN0Cab_x5TIwxOa-ea1qZs2YSFVsd_dQfxanpinKnkuK3NbB0S4AwHqwHem6QBrAYjDmlMRtKbUKGUY%3D)****
---

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: Once in a lifetime
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Reverend Warnock can flip Georgia blue - but only with your support
| | |
---
Friend, we have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to deliver historic Democratic victories in this election, and experts say taking back the Senate will all come down to winning in Georgia.

But I'll be blunt: Winning here won't be easy. It's going to be _extremely_ close. Democrats will only flip this seat and take back the Senate if grassroots donors like you pitch in everything you've got. **[That's why I'm writing to personally request your support for Reverend Raphael Warnock (D-GA), an outstanding servant leader who's running to flip Georgia blue and bring moral leadership to the Senate.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5b2/288179be/9a00ac5/348e75f4/419582541/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjI5LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk229-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
As the senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church, the spiritual home of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., Reverend Warnock has spent his life serving others. He's already been endorsed in this race by Stacey Abrams and others - and he's ready to bring critical fights for justice to the Senate.** If elected, he would make history as Georgia's _first-ever_ Black senator. **

But his Republican opponent, unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler, is spending $20 MILLION of her personal fortune to buy this seat - and Mitch McConnell is lining up the full backing of the GOP establishment to help her pull it off and keep this seat red.
Here's the deal: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says the Senate is up for grabs - but ONLY if we win in Georgia**. Now, with polling showing Reverend Warnock and Kelly Loeffler running _neck and neck_ ,__ there's never been a more critical moment for you to support his campaign.

In a race this close, Reverend Warnock can't afford to miss a single fundraising goal between now and Election Day. Please, friend, I'm counting on people like you to give now so we can flip Georgia blue and retake Senate control from Mitch McConnell:**

**[If you care about taking back the Senate for Democrats, will you rush a donation by midnight tonight to power Reverend Warnock's grassroots campaign, elect Georgia's first Black senator and take back the Senate?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5b2/288179be/9a00ac5/348e75f4/419582541/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjI5LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk229-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk229-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| | [Donate $25](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk229-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| | [Donate $50](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk229-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [Donate another amount](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5b2/288179be/9a00ac5/348e75f4/419582541/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjI5LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk229-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

Thanks for joining me in this fight.

Chuck Schumer

name: Joe Biden
subject: I'm asking you to help me build this team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
My team will be compiling our responses tomorrow, so make sure you open your invitation before midnight. |
---
Peter,

I know my team asks for your feedback on a regular basis through special focus groups like these and other surveys, but this might be our most important one yet.

We don't have much time between now and Election Day, and _even_ _less_ time between now and the Democratic National Convention. So we've got to make sure we're ready to welcome the millions of folks we'll need onto our grassroots coalition to beat Trump.

And since you've been with me since before we made it to the general election, I'm really looking forward to reading your feedback on how to bring new folks on board -- but it looks like you haven't accepted your invitation to join our Pre-Convention Focus Group yet.

[**Will you take just a couple of minutes to join our focus group today? My team will be compiling our responses tomorrow, so make sure you open your invitation before midnight:**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b840/1cd0ac28/170d839a6/357d85c0/3088820481/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2_ns-nonopen_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2_ns-nonopen_RS") | [ENTER FOCUS GROUP](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b840/1cd0ac28/170d839a6/357d85bf/3088820481/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2_ns-nonopen_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2_ns-nonopen_RS")
---
Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts with us.

Joe

\---Forwarded Message---
**From:** JoeBiden.com
**Date:** Tues, Jul 7, 2020
**Subject:** [Focus group invite for Peter](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b840/1cd0ac28/170d839a6/357d85c0/3088820481/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2_ns-nonopen_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2_ns-nonopen_RS")
**To:** [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b840/1cd0ac28/170d839a6/357d85c0/3088820481/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2_ns-nonopen_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2_ns-nonopen_RS")

Peter,

There are only 41 days before the start of the Democratic National Convention on August 17, where Joe Biden will become our OFFICIAL Democratic nominee for President.

This is going to be a huge moment for Democrats across the country, and we know everyone is going to be fired up about electing Joe Biden and defeating Donald Trump!

**So we've really got to hustle to put the final touches on our strategy for maximizing this momentum, and we need your help.**

[ Will you be a part of our Pre-Convention Focus Group and answer a few quick survey questions for us?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b840/1cd0ac28/170d839a6/357d85bf/3088820481/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2_ns-nonopen_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2_ns-nonopen_RS")
[](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b840/1cd0ac28/170d839a6/357d85bf/3088820481/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2_ns-nonopen_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2_ns-nonopen_RS")
---
[ENTER FOCUS GROUP](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b840/1cd0ac28/170d839a6/357d85bf/3088820481/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2_ns-nonopen_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2_ns-nonopen_RS")
---
We'll have the top of our Democratic ticket locked in (including Joe's future running mate!) and _less than three months_ left to defeat Donald Trump by the convention's closing.

But it's not just about taking back the White House -- we also have to keep (and expand on!) our majority in the House, take back the Senate, and put more Democrats in office across all 50 states.

So when we say we need everyone to join our coalition to elect Joe and defeat Trump, we mean _everyone_!

The convention is going to be a huge moment to build momentum and bring more folks on to Team Joe, so we want your feedback on our plan to do that.

[So even if you've answered questions like this before, we count on surveys like this to gather new data and percentages as our team grows and new events (like the convention!) take place.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b840/1cd0ac28/170d839a6/357d85bf/3088820481/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2_ns-nonopen_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2_ns-nonopen_RS")

**Peter, we'll be going over your responses this week, so can you please submit your feedback today? It only takes a few minutes, and it will make a big impact on our strategy moving forward.**
[ENTER FOCUS GROUP](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b840/1cd0ac28/170d839a6/357d85bf/3088820481/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2_ns-nonopen_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2_ns-nonopen_RS")
---
Thanks,

JoeBiden.com

We don't have much time between now and Election Day, and even less time between now and the Democratic National Convention. So we've got to make sure we're ready to welcome the millions of folks we'll need onto our grassroots coalition to beat Trump. And since you've been with me since before we made it to the general election, I'm really looking forward to reading your feedback on how to bring new folks on board -- but it looks like you haven't accepted your invitation to join our Pre-Convention Focus Group yet. "" | "" Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts with us. Joe \---Forwarded Message--- From: JoeBiden.com Date: Tues, Jul 7, 2020 Subject: "" To: "" Peter, There are only 41 days before the start of the Democratic National Convention on August 17, where Joe Biden will become our OFFICIAL Democratic nominee for President. This is going to be a huge moment for Democrats across the country, and we know everyone is going to be fired up about electing Joe Biden and defeating Donald Trump! So we've really got to hustle to put the final touches on our strategy for maximizing this momentum, and we need your help. "" "" "" We'll have the top of our Democratic ticket locked in (including Joe's future running mate!) and less than three months left to defeat Donald Trump by the convention's closing. But it's not just about taking back the White House -- we also have to keep (and expand on!) our majority in the House, take back the Senate, and put more Democrats in office across all 50 states. So when we say we need everyone to join our coalition to elect Joe and defeat Trump, we mean everyone! The convention is going to be a huge moment to build momentum and bring more folks on to Team Joe, so we want your feedback on our plan to do that. "" Peter, we'll be going over your responses this week, so can you please submit your feedback today? It only takes a few minutes, and it will make a big impact on our strategy moving forward. name: Christy Smith
subject: SIGN: Demand McConnell pass the Heroes Act before relief expires
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Hey Peter,

California is taking the tough but necessary step of closing nonessential businesses to halt this new coronavirus spike.

We keep breaking records for new cases. Millions of Americans have lost their jobs. Relief aid is expiring, rent is coming due in less than two weeks, and Senate Republicans _still_ haven't acted to get our people the help they need.

The House passed the Heroes Act -- a crucial coronavirus relief package -- in May, and Mitch McConnell has had _two months_ to move this bill. But another week has come and gone where Republicans have done _nothing_ to help our country navigate this public health crisis.

The urgency and power of a broad coalition of people speaking out is how we got the first coronavirus relief passed. If we want the Senate to act, we need to speak out again.

**[We're done with McConnell and his allies playing political games with their pandemic response while folks are left in the lurch. Will you sign our petition telling McConnell that it's time to quit the partisanship and pass Heroes _now?_](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba9e/29776869/919a6b6/569ef1b4/2605215715/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MTlfaGVyb2VzcGV0Mi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2007_email_christy_heroes?source=em20_200719_heroespet2-full")** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba9e/29776869/919a6b6/569ef1b4/2605215715/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MTlfaGVyb2VzcGV0Mi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2007_email_christy_heroes?source=em20_200719_heroespet2-full") One thing is clear: Republicans like Mitch McConnell and Mike Garcia are willing to ignore the fact that this pandemic is getting worse because they're worried that it's bad for their re-election chances -- and they're terrified of angering Donald Trump.

They'd like you to believe that this pandemic is ending. But the truth is that it's far from over, and we need to take action now -- before this crisis gets even worse.

Here's what Republicans are doing by stalling the Heroes Act: **they're refusing to act to save local businesses, help families pay their bills, and keep our people safe.**

Among its other provisions, the Heroes Act will extend pandemic unemployment benefits through next year, extend hazard pay to essential workers, and provide funding for coronavirus testing, tracing, and treatment. This legislation is essential to our country's economic recovery and to saving lives as we combat the pandemic.

We can't afford to wait a second longer. **Our leaders need to act now.**

**[If you agree, please take a moment and add your name to our petition calling on McConnell to pass the Heroes Act immediately.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba9e/29776869/919a6b6/569ef1b4/2605215715/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MTlfaGVyb2VzcGV0Mi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2007_email_christy_heroes?source=em20_200719_heroespet2-full")** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba9e/29776869/919a6b6/569ef1b4/2605215715/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MTlfaGVyb2VzcGV0Mi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2007_email_christy_heroes?source=em20_200719_heroespet2-full") Thank you for your support,

Christy

|
[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba9e/29776869/919a6b6/569ef1b5/2605215715/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MTlfaGVyb2VzcGV0Mi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200719_heroespet2-full")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors in Ventura and LA county on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this top pick-up House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba9e/29776869/919a6b6/569ef1b5/2605215715/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MTlfaGVyb2VzcGV0Mi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200719_heroespet2-full")
---

| | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress.
---|---
|

PO Box 301, 24307 Magic Mountain Pkwy, Valencia, CA 91355.

If you no longer want to hear from Christy Smith, [**click here to get off all our lists instantly.**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba9e/29776869/919a6b6/569ef1b7/2605215715/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba9e/29776869/919a6b6/569ef1b0/2605215715/VEsP/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/contact"). |

name: Team Hagerty
subject: ICYMI: Breitbart: Trump Stumps for Hagerty in TN Senate Race — ‘Somebody Who Will Never Let You Down'
body:
Peter,

We wanted to make sure you saw the story Breitbart released yesterday about Bill Hagerty's tele-town hall with President Donald Trump last night. You can read a portion of the story below:

Trump Stumps for Hagerty in TN Senate Race — ‘Somebody Who Will Never Let You Down'

Jeff Poor

Breitbart [https://www.breitbart.com/politics/2020/07/18/trump-stumps-for-hagerty-in-tn-senate-race-somebody-who-will-never-let-you-down/]

July 18, 2020

With 20 days to go until Tennessee Republican voters select who they want to represent their party on the November ballot, President Donald Trump participated in a tele-town hall on Friday to promote the candidacy of former U.S. ambassador to Japan Bill Hagerty.

...

Trump insisted Hagerty was the best choice, noting the former ambassador’s loyalty from the 2016 campaign, through the transition and into his presidency.

“Bill Hagerty is somebody I know very well,” Trump said. “He was my ambassador to Japan. He was a fantastic ambassador. I’ll never forget — I went to Japan, he knew every person over there. He knew the businessmen. He could pronounce those names that I had a hard time with. I had a very hard time with some of those names. It was amazing. He was one of the truly great ambassadors that I have ever met. And I’ve met some good ones, and I’ve met some very bad ones, to be honest here. But Bill is so solid, so good, and they still miss him.”

“He said he wanted to run for the Senate from a state that he loves, so I am calling everybody in Tennessee to get out and vote early,” he continued. “You can get out there right now and vote for Ambassador Bill Hagerty for Senate. Early voting starts immediately, and it ends August 1. It is something that is so important. You’ve got a real primary here. The other side is spending a lot of money. But Bill is somebody who will never let you down. He’ll go so far out. He’ll never let you down. I’ve known Bill for a long time. He was one of my earliest supporters. He worked on my campaign in 2016 and my transition after we won. He’s been so great in so many ways.”

...

“We need to send great conservative voices out there,” Trump said. “One of the things you’ve probably heard that I’ve done, and have gotten a lot of credit for is judges. By the end of the first term, we’ll have almost 300 judges, which I think is a record. It’s got to be pretty close to a record.”

“I will tell you — this is very important with the votes and the Supreme Court, and it is even right now,” he continued. “The Supreme Court justice choice is very important, and I won’t let you down. The next president, hopefully, that is going to be us for another four years because nobody has done what we have done. No other president has done as much and as good as we’ve done in the first four years of a term. And we’ve got possibly two, three or even four Supreme Court justice picks during this term. I want all the help I can get. Bill and other Senators have to get those justices approved, and Bill will be leading the pack.”

READ THE S [https://www.breitbart.com/politics/2020/07/18/trump-stumps-for-hagerty-in-tn-senate-race-somebody-who-will-never-let-you-down/] TORY [https://www.breitbart.com/politics/2020/07/18/trump-stumps-for-hagerty-in-tn-senate-race-somebody-who-will-never-let-you-down/]

Team Hagerty

4515 Harding Pike

Suite 110

Nashville, TN 37205 Preferences https://hfs.updatemyprofile.com/t-pdyiuuk-76178D70-fuutjhhtj-h | Unsubscribe https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-u-pdyiuuk-fuutjhhtj-k/

name: Team Espy
subject: Hard won
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Espy for U
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18323635/224942956/1543981737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWZlYzUxYy04N2NhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Mw3TIAkUJx31qecxlRQP1N5RSQ-2ugvO_0RDC3kG_0=&emci=44fec51c-87ca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=45fec51c-87ca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)
Mississippi is changing, but that change has been very hard won. Mike Espy has witnessed and experienced the challenges facing our state throughout his life, from being one of 18 Black students to integrate Yazoo City High School (where he helped lead a walkout), to becoming Mississippi’s first Black U.S congressman since Reconstruction, and becoming the first (and only) Black U.S. secretary of agriculture in history. **Now, Mike wants to keep moving Mississippi forward by fighting for every Mississippian in the U.S. Senate – unlike our opponent, Cindy Hyde-Smith, who’s holding us back and hurting our state.** [**Please take a moment to watch Mike Espy’s new ad that shares some of his incredible life story and his motivation for running to become Mississippi’s next senator, then pitch in to help him succeed:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18323636/224942957/-1786891919?refcode=em-200720-ad&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWZlYzUxYy04N2NhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Mw3TIAkUJx31qecxlRQP1N5RSQ-2ugvO_0RDC3kG_0=) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18323637/224942958/-1786891919?refcode=em-200720-ad&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWZlYzUxYy04N2NhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Mw3TIAkUJx31qecxlRQP1N5RSQ-2ugvO_0RDC3kG_0=)** Mike’s family has a legacy of breaking barriers and making a difference in Mississippi. His grandfather founded the first hospital in the state to serve Black patients in 1924. Up until then, Black Mississippians were forced to give birth in the fields or sharecropper shacks. After Emmett Till was lynched, his body was released to Mike’s father's funeral home for the awful responsibility of preparing him for return to Chicago. Mike experienced harassment when he integrated his high school, including teachers spraying him with fire extinguishers and students beating him up. **But Mike went on to dedicate his career to serving Mississippi. Mike loves Mississippi, and our campaign is about lifting up our people. Progress is hard won, and Mississippi has a hurtful past, but Mike is ready and willing to fight for it.** On the flip side, Cindy Hyde-Smith is trying to drag us back into the worst of Mississippi’s history with her talk of public hangings and voter suppression, glorifying confederate symbols, and refusal to support the changing of Mississippi’s state flag. [**Together, we have what it takes to keep Mississippi moving forward toward a brighter future. If you’re ready for more progress, chip in $10 or more to support our campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18323638/224942959/-1786891919?refcode=em-200720-ad&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWZlYzUxYy04N2NhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Mw3TIAkUJx31qecxlRQP1N5RSQ-2ugvO_0RDC3kG_0=) | | [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18323639/224942960/-1786891919?refcode=em-200720-ad&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWZlYzUxYy04N2NhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Mw3TIAkUJx31qecxlRQP1N5RSQ-2ugvO_0RDC3kG_0=)
---
We don’t get what we don’t fight for. This November, let’s make history and move Mississippi forward, together.
– Team Espy

[**Chip in to his campaign here >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18323664/224943341/1282771135?refcode=07202020_em_su_tk_b1_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNThjOWEwMC04OGNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TgVWRy4ppBNa01A3hkQDSc1euOIXvOW0psTvAleTSgA=)_
* * *
---
Dear Friend, After several months without action, the Senate is about to take on the task of additional relief to support Americans and their businesses as the COVID-19 pandemic drags on. Our gross mismanagement of the disease makes this a necessary step. You can be sure that the exploding federal deficit will factor into the conversation. As one of his top three priorities, Sessions says he wants to balance the budget without raising taxes. As one of his last acts before his constituents fired him, he supported the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, which added $1.9 trillion to our debt. During his first five years in office, we ran a $537 billion cumulative _surplus_. In his last 17 years, he managed to turn that into a $10.8 trillion cumulative deficit. Pete Sessions' zombie-like adherence to decades old failed fiscal policy ideas had us teetering on a cliff - then the pandemic hit. How many decades are we going to give him to get it right? How many more future generations of Americans are we going to let him undermine? I say - none. We need a new breed of representative. Citizen legislators who will take the long view and support policies that will dig us out of the hole Sessions and his ilk left us in. Policies meant to position America for success for generations to come. I can be that Representative for you. _**[Demand Better. Pitch in now and help me beat Pete.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18323665/224943342/-1907457920?refcode=07202020_line&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNThjOWEwMC04OGNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TgVWRy4ppBNa01A3hkQDSc1euOIXvOW0psTvAleTSgA=)**_ _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | ONE TIME CONTRIBUTIONS | MONTHLY CONTRIBUTIONS

clean_body: | Rick Kennedy (D-Central Texas) is the Democratic nominee for Congress in the 17th District. = Dear Friend, After several months without action, the Senate is about to take on the task of additional relief to support Americans and their businesses as the COVID-19 pandemic drags on. Our gross mismanagement of the disease makes this a necessary step. You can be sure that the exploding federal deficit will factor into the conversation. As one of his top three priorities, Sessions says he wants to balance the budget without raising taxes. As one of his last acts before his constituents fired him, he supported the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, which added $1.9 trillion to our debt. During his first five years in office, we ran a $537 billion cumulative surplus. In his last 17 years, he managed to turn that into a $10.8 trillion cumulative deficit. Pete Sessions' zombie-like adherence to decades old failed fiscal policy ideas had us teetering on a cliff - then the pandemic hit. How many decades are we going to give him to get it right? How many more future generations of Americans are we going to let him undermine? I say - none. We need a new breed of representative. Citizen legislators who will take the long view and support policies that will dig us out of the hole Sessions and his ilk left us in. Policies meant to position America for success for generations to come. I can be that Representative for you. =** If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: | ONE TIME CONTRIBUTIONS | MONTHLY CONTRIBUTIONS ---|--- = | = = | = = | = = | = Thank you, and stay safe. Rick | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Future=20Generations?=
subject: Cori Bush Knocking the House Out of the Park!
body:
Progressive Insurgent Cori Bush A Future Generations Candidate! | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=e5b3f7ff3b&e=66979298f9)
---
| | |
## _CORI BUSH WILL WIN MISSOURI_
---
|
### **We're going all in for Future Generations candidate, Cori Bush!**
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=950407e535&e=66979298f9)
---
| Future Generations is proud to endorse Cori Bush for Missouri's 1st Congressional District. Cori, an educator and a nurse, has been a civil rights activist advocating for racial justice, police reform, healthcare, and environmental justice her entire life — not because it's popular, but because it's the right thing to do. We are down to the wire and need to help Cori win her primary election on Tuesday, August 4th!
---
| [VOLUNTEER FOR CORI!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9b01118fef&e=66979298f9 "VOLUNTEER FOR CORI!")
---
|
---
|
> _"I’m honored to receive the endorsement of Future Generations PAC, because they know—like I know—that climate change is a crisis that we have to act swiftly and boldly to address if we want to leave our world habitable for the next generation. We need to fight with everything we’ve got to enact a Green New Deal, and that’s exactly what I plan to do in Congress.”
>
> — **Cori Bush** , Candidate for Congress (MO-01)_
---
|
---
|
#### **CORI HAS BUILT A NATIONWIDE & INTERNATIONAL COALITION**
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=0c2c698d18&e=66979298f9)
---
From Ferguson to the current Black Lives Matter movement, Cori has been in the frontlines advocating for racial justice and police reform. Cori is ready to oust the old guard of representation from St. Louis. When our representatives are only doing for themselves, we have to find those who have always and will always fight for those who are voiceless, our most vulnerable. We have full confidence that Cori will be that person for Missouri's 1st Congressional District and the nation.
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=e462f0a2eb&e=66979298f9)
---
Cori inspired millions worldwide as they watched her journey in [Netflix's "Knock Down the House."](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=2bd1dc1921&e=66979298f9) Together, Cori and Roza we're honored to travel to Argentina to build a coalition of people powered politics; meeting with Argentina's Congress, progressive militants, and new progressive candidates. We must do everything to ensure insurgent candidates who carry their communities in their hearts and minds, win and represent us in D.C.
|
---
| | Due to COVID-19 health and safety restrictions, we must focus on phone and text banking to get our candidates message to their constituents.**[ Will you invest today for seven generations into the future?](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=a3e0d17e97&e=66979298f9)**
---
| [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=b5f8b6e50a&e=66979298f9)
---
| **_ON THE GROUND FOR CORI_**
If our success in Texas shows how effective we can be with just a few dollars. We want to repeat that smae success in Missouri. We will be hosting weekly canvassing, visibility, phone and text banking events for Cori. It will cost us around $2,800 to cover these costs. [Will you chip in to help us cover these expenses so we can keep winning?](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=0e6bb590cf&e=66979298f9)
---
| [DONATE TO HELP COVER ACTION COSTS](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=33387e0b46&e=66979298f9 "DONATE TO HELP COVER ACTION COSTS")
---
|
#### **A MESSAGE FROM ROZA CALDERON**
---
| Supporting Cori Bush was a no brainer. I was fortunate enough to be part of a small group of activists who were nominated by their communities to run for Congress in 2018 under Justice Democrats and Brand New Congress(BNC). A few of us attended a training in DC hosted by BNC and one by one went up to give our stump speech in front of those in attendance. When Cori went up, the energy changed. The power she carries is inspiring! I left that summit thinking, "We need Cori's in every state. In every race. Fighting for the people." That is my commitment.

Roza Calderon
Executive Director
[roza@futuregenerations.earth](mailto:roza@futuregenerations.earth)
---
[ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=c60f4e5148&e=66979298f9)
|
---

clean_body: Progressive Insurgent Cori Bush A Future Generations Candidate! | | | | | | | CORI BUSH WILL WIN MISSOURI | We're going all in for Future Generations candidate, Cori Bush! | | Future Generations is proud to endorse Cori Bush for Missouri's 1st Congressional District. Cori, an educator and a nurse, has been a civil rights activist advocating for racial justice, police reform, healthcare, and environmental justice her entire life — not because it's popular, but because it's the right thing to do. We are down to the wire and need to help Cori win her primary election on Tuesday, August 4th! | "VOLUNTEER FOR CORI!" | | "I’m honored to receive the endorsement of Future Generations PAC, because they know—like I know—that climate change is a crisis that we have to act swiftly and boldly to address if we want to leave our world habitable for the next generation. We need to fight with everything we’ve got to enact a Green New Deal, and that’s exactly what I plan to do in Congress.” — Cori Bush , Candidate for Congress (MO-01) | | CORI HAS BUILT A NATIONWIDE & INTERNATIONAL COALITION | From Ferguson to the current Black Lives Matter movement, Cori has been in the frontlines advocating for racial justice and police reform. Cori is ready to oust the old guard of representation from St. Louis. When our representatives are only doing for themselves, we have to find those who have always and will always fight for those who are voiceless, our most vulnerable. We have full confidence that Cori will be that person for Missouri's 1st Congressional District and the nation. | Cori inspired millions worldwide as they watched her journey in Together, Cori and Roza we're honored to travel to Argentina to build a coalition of people powered politics; meeting with Argentina's Congress, progressive militants, and new progressive candidates. We must do everything to ensure insurgent candidates who carry their communities in their hearts and minds, win and represent us in D.C. | | | Due to COVID-19 health and safety restrictions, we must focus on phone and text banking to get our candidates message to their constituents. | | ON THE GROUND FOR CORI If our success in Texas shows how effective we can be with just a few dollars. We want to repeat that smae success in Missouri. We will be hosting weekly canvassing, visibility, phone and text banking events for Cori. It will cost us around $2,800 to cover these costs. | "DONATE TO HELP COVER ACTION COSTS" | A MESSAGE FROM ROZA CALDERON | Supporting Cori Bush was a no brainer. I was fortunate enough to be part of a small group of activists who were nominated by their communities to run for Congress in 2018 under Justice Democrats and Brand New Congress(BNC). A few of us attended a training in DC hosted by BNC and one by one went up to give our stump speech in front of those in attendance. When Cori went up, the energy changed. The power she carries is inspiring! I left that summit thinking, "We need Cori's in every state. In every race. Fighting for the people." That is my commitment. Roza Calderon Executive Director mailto:roza@futuregenerations.earth | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Future Generations PAC, All rights reserved.

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Georgia is a battleground
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
I need your help, friend
| | |
---
Friend: I'm about to ask you to make a donation to our campaign to help us hit our crucial mid-month goal. **But first, let me tell you why this is so important - and what will happen if we fall short**.
Growing up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, my family didn't have much. But through hard work, determination and the support of my community, I earned a college degree - and later, became the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church.
Here's the hard truth: The opportunities that made my journey possible - from Kayton Homes to Dr. King's pulpit - are increasingly out of reach for far too many. I'm running for Senate because every Georgian deserves a seat at the table - but only with your support will we be able to make this a reality.
**That's why I'm personally asking you to chip in right now and help us hit our $50,000 goal and win in this critical battleground state. I 'm counting on you to come through, Friend: ****[Please, will you give $5 or more now, so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5b8/288179be/99db3f0/348e75f3/4025712598/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzc1LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk375-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5b8/288179be/99db3f0/348e75f3/4025712598/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzc1LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk375-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
The stakes are high, friend. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight confirms that Democrats CAN flip the Senate - and analysts at _The Washington Post_ say that winning in Georgia is key to making this happen.
**But already, my wealthy Republican opponent has started spending _$20 MILLION of her own fortune_ against me - and you can bet that the GOP will flood Georgia with cash to stop our campaign in its tracks.**
We are in the fight for the soul of our nation's democracy. It's a tough fight - but it's a fight we can win. If we're going to take back the Senate from corrupt leaders like Mitch McConnell, we need to first win here in Georgia. But we can't get it done without support from grassroots folks like you.
**So, friend, with time running out before this crucial deadline, I have to ask: [Please, if you care about taking back the Senate for Democrats, will you give $5 - or even $10 - to help us hit our mid-month goal, flip Georgia blue and restore moral leadership to our government?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5b8/288179be/99db3f0/348e75f3/4025712598/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzc1LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk375-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
I'm so grateful for your support - thank you.

Reverend Warnock
| [Contribute](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5b8/288179be/99db3f0/348e75f3/4025712598/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzc1LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk375-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

| | Texas Republican Governor Greg Abbott has dragged his feet in setting up restrictions to prevent the spread of coronavirus, and it’s led to a record-breaking surge in cases: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18330433/225058433/1803533031?refcode=SGL_EM_FR_200720_AbbottMcCaul_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWE3ZDJhMS1hZWNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v1rpzLeobRRIm6s7TMdWH52GEwocEgDqTC_rJnMcgKc=) Abbott’s disastrous response to this pandemic has led to many preventable deaths. **And Republican Michael McCaul has been by Abbott’s side, enabling his terrible policies and pushing the racist narrative of blaming China for our own mistakes.** Abbott is finally stepping up to slow the spread. But, with so many new cases and lives lost, it’s far too late — and he’s doing way too little. He’s enabled by Republicans like Michael McCaul who refuse to wear masks on the House floor and sow doubt in the virus’ severity. Enough is enough. _We won’t let Republicans make it out of this pandemic with no consequences_ — we have to show Michael McCaul that the people don’t support his reckless and cruel actions. subject: Week of July 20th Action Items: Reopen Schools, Call the White House, & Real Civics!
body:
| |
---
This week, we need to keep up the pressure to reopen schools and stop Congress from spending more money that we don’t have. We also have a new civics activity that you can do with your kids or grandkids, because no matter what happens with the schools, America’s kids need real civics.
|

In case you missed it last week, **[download this sample letter](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjAyLTMwNjNmM2VjNThhMzRjNTE5MWY5YTI2NjdkZjZjYjJk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1NhbXBsZS1MZXR0ZXItdG8tU2Nob29sLUJvYXJkLS1SZW9wZW4tb3VyLXNjaG9vbHMuZG9jeD9taWQ9NDI0MDMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=R-Am19sUSzHoJyaSQ_57tg) to your school board members urging them to reopen the schools**. **Share this video:[The science is clear, children are very low-risk for COVID-19](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjAyLTMwNjNmM2VjNThhMzRjNTE5MWY5YTI2NjdkZjZjYjJk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9GaG5oOUxkYkRTaz9taWQ9NDI0MDMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=3FxhyrjND4JGyvwCQVFQWg)**. [EMAIL](mailto:?subject=It’s time to get our economy back on track!&body=https://www.facebook.com/teapartypatriots/photos/a.155447495778/10157357666160779)
|
---
**Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again
Week of July 20th **
We all understand that schools need to reopen. However, we also know that public schools have fallen very short of teaching our children proper civics for many years. That’s why Tea Party Patriots is going to be suggesting weekly resources and ideas for parents and grandparents to use over the summer and even as school begins again to help you ensure that your children or grandchildren understand and appreciate our founding and our country.

For the week of July 20th, read [the Bill of Rights](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjAyLTMwNjNmM2VjNThhMzRjNTE5MWY5YTI2NjdkZjZjYjJk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9uY2NzLm5ldC9ibG9ncy9hbWVyaWNhcy1mb3VuZGluZy1kb2N1bWVudHMvYmlsbC1vZi1yaWdodHMtYW1lbmRtZW50cy0xLTEwP21pZD00MjQwMyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=IzNzrN08rxIi569zKJrMjg) (Amendments 1 – 10) with your kids or grandkids. Then, you can use the following questions to prompt a family discussion.
1. _Why is it significant that the language is, “Congress shall make no law... abridging the freedom of speech...?” Hint: it does not say, “Congress shall grant you the right to...” Discuss the rest of the 1st Amendment in this same context. Does it give the government the power to grant us our rights, or does the language require the government to protect rights and keep from violating them?_
2. _What does “infringed” mean, and how does that shape the meaning of the 2nd Amendment?_
3. _See if everyone in your family can state what each amendment is about without looking. This is not necessarily memorizing them word for word, but who can remember what each one is about? There can even be prizes involved!_
4. _Is this a Bill of Rights or a Bill of Permissions? Discuss._

You can view a copy of the Bill of Rights here: [https://nccs.net/blogs/americas-founding-documents/bill-of-rights-amendments-1-10](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjAyLTMwNjNmM2VjNThhMzRjNTE5MWY5YTI2NjdkZjZjYjJk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9uY2NzLm5ldC9ibG9ncy9hbWVyaWNhcy1mb3VuZGluZy1kb2N1bWVudHMvYmlsbC1vZi1yaWdodHMtYW1lbmRtZW50cy0xLTEwP21pZD00MjQwMyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=tPbRBljFNLc55oWOyRURmA)

Keep an eye out every week for a new activity or book or lesson to bring real civics back to our children.
|
---
**Attend this Heritage Virtual Event**
The Heritage Foundation is hosting a very important and informative event on Critical Theory, what that is, and how it has infected everything in American life. What we are seeing today with Antifa, BLM, identity politics, and more, is a result of a fringe academic ideology called Critical Theory.

Date: **Friday, July 24th**
Time: **Noon ET**
Title: **Wokeism at Work: How "Critical Theory" and Anti-Racism Training Divide America**
**[RSVP TO THE EVENT](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjAyLTMwNjNmM2VjNThhMzRjNTE5MWY5YTI2NjdkZjZjYjJk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL3Byb2dyZXNzaXZpc20vZXZlbnQvdmlydHVhbC1ldmVudC13b2tlaXNtLXdvcmstaG93LWNyaXRpY2FsLXRoZW9yeS1hbmQtYW50aS1yYWNpc20tdHJhaW5pbmctZGl2aWRlP21pZD00MjQwMyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=g02NpyMol8bhVRxZP6R2NA)**
|
---
In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin

name: Team Joe
subject: There are pictures of dogs in this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Have you met Champ and Major? |
---
Peter, in a minute, we're going to ask you to donate to Joe Biden's campaign. But first, we have to ask you a question. Have you met Champ and Major?

Champ is Vice President and Dr. Biden's older pup, who they adopted just after Obama and Biden's election victory in 2008! name: Nicole & Maria
subject: anti-socialism
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friends, Do you know what socialism really looks like? We do. It is the complete economic dismantling of a country all while power is concentrated and placed in the hands of a few corrupt elites.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=216A341A1A4346)
---
| | |
---
| | Friends,

Do you know what socialism really looks like?

We do.

It is the complete economic dismantling of a country all while power is concentrated and placed in the hands of a few corrupt elites.

Look no further than what happened to Cuba and Venezuela!

No one knows that understands that horrible truth better than us - we’re Maria Elvira Salazar and Nicole Malliotakis.

We are both proud 1st Generation Americans, Republican candidates for Congress (Maria in Florida and Nicole in New York), and the daughters of Cuban refugees.

Maria’s mother and father escaped Cuba with just $5 in their pockets before the Castro regime could imprison them, or worse!

Nicole’s mother fled Cuba as a child, forced to leave behind her father, who stayed to protect the family business... which ultimately was taken by the TYRANNICAL government along with their childhood home.

Our families have seen firsthand the horrors of socialism. The DESPAIR, DESTRUCTION, and DEATH that happens when you take freedom away from people and concentrate power in a few corrupt leaders.
[
And we’re running for Congress because we absolutely cannot let the terror that our parents escaped come to the United States of America.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=216A341A1A4346)

---
| | |
---
| | [ SUPPORT OUR FIGHT AGAINST SOCIALISM ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=216A341A1A4346)
---
| | |
---
| | If you think that couldn’t possibly happen here, think again. Self-proclaimed socialists like Alexandria Ocasio Cortez are consolidating power in Congress. More and more radical socialists are winning seats with AOC’s backing and working to turn America into another Cuba or Venezuela.

These radical socialists can't be reasoned with; they hate America and everything for which it stands. Their goal is to overthrow our current system of government. That's why the only option to save this country from socialism is to give these socialists a complete and stunning defeat this November. [But we must have your support to stop the socialist path our country is hurtling towards.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=216A341A1A4346)

We’re running for Congress, to tell the truth about the dangerous socialist policies pushed by radicals like AOC and Ilhan Omar and fight back against their plan to destroy America.

We aren’t exaggerating, "undoing America" is literally what they publicly say they want to do.

We won’t stop fighting because giving up would be telling our parents that their hard work giving us a better life was a waste, that they should have just surrendered to socialism in Cuba. And that’s never going to happen.

Help us fight back - before it’s too late. [We’re working together to raise $10,000 by midnight, help us reach our goal before AOC raises taxes and puts that money toward making government elitists richer.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=216A341A1A4346)

We’re counting on you, and we won’t let you down.

Thank you,

---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=216A341A1A4346)
---
| | Nicole Malliotakis & Maria Elvira Salazar

We can't let Democrats like Jeanne Shaheen and Dan Feltes get away with their plans to implement an Income Tax in New Hampshire. | | | | | | ---|---|--- New Hampshire GOP 10 Water Street, Concord New Hampshire 03301 United States You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us. | | | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dana=20Barrett?=
subject: Are we on different planets? 🌎
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dana Barrett for Congress**
body:
Last Wednesday, President Trump flew into Georgia to pack into a crowded room for a taxpayer-funded photo op. My opponent Rep. Barry Loudermilk was... |
---
| | [ ](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=d67d9bce6e&e=e25784ff28)
---
| | Dear -

I don't know if you saw this, but last Wednesday, Trump flew into Atlanta and packed into a crowded room for a taxpayer-funded photo op. Of course, my representative and opponent, Barry Loudermilk took time out to be there as well. **On the same day, while there were 3,781 new COVID-19 cases in the state, Barry was doing this:**
---
|
---
---
| Notice anything missing from these pictures?
How 'bout masks? And social distancing?

It's not surprising. Loudermilk doesn't believe science and doesn't care about the lives of the people he is supposed to represent. He claims to be a believer in the "unalienable rights" of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness, as described in The Declaration of Independence, a document he quotes often. If he truly cared about your right to live he wouldn't look so happy ignoring the sick and dying for a photo opp.

I cannot stand for this. His smile in these photos breaks my heart. People in our district are dying. They are sick. Their businesses and futures are in jeopardy. This is why I keep asking for your support.

[Can you chip in today](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=e01f7b8e85&e=e25784ff28) and help me _actually_ work to protect our unalienable rights?

subject: Winning in November starts with us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Powered By People

This movement is gaining traction.

Last Friday, the New York Times featured our ambitious efforts around
reaching every single Democrat in Texas, all in service of achieving our
key goals: win a majority in the State House and stop Trump forever in
November.

[1]Headline of Beto in the New York Times

To accomplish this, we need your help —
starting with our phone banks this week. Join Beto, our staff, and our
team of volunteers to reach out to and identify voters who will support
Democrats in Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42664?source=ema20200720-98248&t=1001&akid=98248%2E444211%2E0V2EKL ]Virtual Voter Contact Phone Bank with Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42664?source=ema20200720-98248&t=1002&akid=98248%2E444211%2E0V2EKL ]Monday, July 20, 6:30pm CT (tonight!)

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42664?source=ema20200720-98248&t=1003&akid=98248%2E444211%2E0V2EKL ]Get more info or RSVP »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34385?source=ema20200720-98248&t=1004&akid=98248%2E444211%2E0V2EKL ]Virtual Phone Bank with Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34385?source=ema20200720-98248&t=1005&akid=98248%2E444211%2E0V2EKL ]Thursday, July 23, 6:30pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34385?source=ema20200720-98248&t=1006&akid=98248%2E444211%2E0V2EKL ]Get more info or RSVP »

Over the next few months, we need to reach out to every single voter, get
them registered to vote, and show up to the polls in November. The only
way we can do this if thousands of people — like you — pitch in and put in
the effort, week after week.

This isn't going to be easy, but it's certainly not impossible. We've
gotten so close before, which means we know exactly how to get across the
finish line.

Winning in November — turning Texas blue, stopping Donald Trump forever —
begins with us. Please help us out and do your part, and join us this week
for a phone bank.

Thanks for all that you do,

The Powered by People Team

disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
With everything from our police and the safety of our communities to jobs and our economic comeback on the line... [ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=80da46f280ef4c2783932423a6966870&_e=xulgM9IuRcSzmh9DsyFdy9O6MNxv2W4InJJ4xH8JX3GG6jAceuPAUqQq32jEtAMqsWYctHYOpxtX2i29RefP-WMG8s2hfWK2C86e9uqUCAsuofJSh-Mp553stgW7HdwVk8f5_oO-J24Izlmqk3JOKHHFZQp6EbgUQ_m_UzecW_q3miC4ZoXwJZ7_FZbBB9NX9uSOwixq2OMWBITsbxyrd6xX9B0FgreIc_wA1KttNAv3qh0tclrK5TkRetdqCbRumBvlwoSIsGv20P3sMefMy5Eqp8G836Q-xHvne_GSDoi8rGnbSxkfUrwbPU7UxZMhjuZjMFlYzTnQDfVKIhR4TfOP9HpPbH8JhjiMwz4IAxIPha75YesKlXphbvsE0kKrBHMGRwhvNl25ZJ3E_cQuHiN1wY8baBHvGG20APYLxvVk7fHqAxmA7MdTduyW_UsTteCUO3w2XquK1Rt0LQ4NjOZYUvwUT8sVLAKkW_rER6Ln9twXxcrbZjpOOrBFSc39) | |

Friend,

**July is a critical month for our campaign and for all of Illinois. Here’s why:**

After July, we’ll be just **three months** away from Election Day, and we can’t waste a single day in the fight to keep our district, our state, and our nation on a path that promotes freedom and opportunity.

**[I’m reaching out one last time to see if you’d be willing to take a small step to protect our district and help us take back Congress this year by joining our July Money Bomb.](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=80da46f280ef4c2783932423a6966870&_e=xulgM9IuRcSzmh9DsyFdy9O6MNxv2W4InJJ4xH8JX3GG6jAceuPAUqQq32jEtAMqsWYctHYOpxtX2i29RefP-WMG8s2hfWK2C86e9uqUCAsuofJSh-Mp553stgW7HdwVk8f5_oO-J24Izlmqk3JOKHHFZQp6EbgUQ_m_UzecW_q3miC4ZoXwJZ7_FZbBB9NX9uSOwixq2OMWBITsbxyrd6xX9B0FgreIc_wA1KttNAv3qh0tclrK5TkRetdqCbRumBvlwoSIsGv20P3sMefMy15t-zk9uYayT6r8_2i7zFbexDXb7dmhIzAnn95Ncn8spICWglyEpWDjEol8XuT97pt46MEDmJ5LZSaz67euL3Y8Brmw0dZbq5aMOrj3tHUeQNUlng6yPd9_Je0TX0UX494lz7PYa3zcRfzefCKQ0VRuNqyMe_BnGdHQ_WGqk_1KbMk8mOQVgxfY3PvnmKiNhSdD2fW7TeMF5s5DFoP0uPh6Km7qqi4OreUPtV3vOklB)**

**[COUNT ME IN! JOIN OUR JULY MONEY BOMB](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=80da46f280ef4c2783932423a6966870&_e=xulgM9IuRcSzmh9DsyFdy9O6MNxv2W4InJJ4xH8JX3GG6jAceuPAUqQq32jEtAMqsWYctHYOpxtX2i29RefP-WMG8s2hfWK2C86e9uqUCAsuofJSh-Mp553stgW7HdwVk8f5_oO-J24Izlmqk3JOKHHFZQp6EbgUQ_m_UzecW_q3miC4ZoXwJZ7_FZbBB9NX9uSOwixq2OMWBITsbxyrd6xX9B0FgreIc_wA1KttNAv3qh0tclrK5TkRetdqCbRumBvlwoSIsGv20P3sMefMy3z8Fv4hPNFxAn6YTPsIzIfb2eBlgjsbY_jtgRAAiDEAzkszJh37-hBH-m4JqkaurbKVbIMYF6yzdVFIdnX0AvEeIAYh6dQUZ8UKEIECF1wgpFP5kz-ewkXa6cgMCIp2n-mqdUw98SBNmb2lkbsUV9HOJbgudoghoZex3J3aTbNPqu7zqGahQspADa7hIdwJv0_VmlM8fOLgy1NIMDak63KbMrIULh_2RXiimdTmUlRp)**

_In case you haven’t heard yet, here’s how we’re planning to meet our fundraising goals this month:_

You rush in a donation of just $18 today for our 18th District and pledge to match it on our July 31st fundraising deadline to push us over the top.

**With everything from our police and the safety of our communities to jobs and our economic comeback on the line, every bit of support we can get goes a long way.**

**[RUSH IN $18 FOR OUR 18TH DISTRICT](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=80da46f280ef4c2783932423a6966870&_e=xulgM9IuRcSzmh9DsyFdy9O6MNxv2W4InJJ4xH8JX3GG6jAceuPAUqQq32jEtAMqsWYctHYOpxtX2i29RefP-WMG8s2hfWK2C86e9uqUCAsuofJSh-Mp553stgW7HdwVk8f5_oO-J24Izlmqk3JOKHHFZQp6EbgUQ_m_UzecW_q3miC4ZoXwJZ7_FZbBB9NX9uSOwixq2OMWBITsbxyrd6xX9B0FgreIc_wA1KttNAv3qh0tclrK5TkRetdqCbRumBvlwoSIsGv20P3sMefMyyZPSjXI-24mkJXd7X5JK5v6fF5fw7hIwbJpS1wK2RS5ENXuJnhZenj014FmI35vl4QhFKwLBnllv6sxpouEUJSWp9W5dvz7gZrsA4E87i0F1WSRCxsYmwO-UUDhdSiLc8xHG-UFEBIQCKcDMeRRiLgKfA8VFeP1u9ozVkhtYVoBbV32QGikY-mWx1U7RFKjFjqxGruAGVVgrNGQPMYK_95lPVcegDaEOxy3G7rAnXtK)**

Our grassroots supporters like you are the ones who are the heart and soul of our campaign, and that’s why I’m relying on you to pull us through this year at the ballot box – but we have a long, tough road ahead of us before we get there.

Thank you for fighting with me,

Darin LaHood

name: Laura Loomer
subject: 30 Day Countdown!
body:
We're looking to secure the most coveted time slots on television for our demographic!
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-384716-907214-5101006-d18bd410fe-37bec76c43)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-384716-907214-5101005-a7b21b62a8-37bec76c43) In less than 30 days, voters will be headed to the polls for my primary!

While my internal polls have me ahead of my closest competitor in the race by a mile, this isn’t just about winning the primary, **we have to energize and turn out as many Republicans as possible on Primary Day to motivate them for November**.

[Help me blanket the airwaves next week by helping us raise $62,000!](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-384716-907214-5101005-a7b21b62a8-37bec76c43)

We're looking to secure the most coveted time slots on television for our demographic!

This will be our biggest purchase for the campaign so far and the one that will be the most effective!

**[Please pitch in $10 today](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-384716-907214-5101005-a7b21b62a8-37bec76c43)**.

When we match your $10 with the gift of 99 other supporters, we pay for an ad.

This will be a group effort and it’s going to take all of us chipping in the minimum to pull it off.

[Are you in?](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-384716-907214-5101005-a7b21b62a8-37bec76c43)

A few weeks ago, Facebook shut the campaign down completely from running ads to voters. They were doing their best to stop us but we quickly regrouped and as of today, our ads have been seen 81,000 times by voters!

Now we have to reach them on television as well, so help us hit our goal and get these ads running as soon as we can. [Please pitch in $10 today](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-384716-907214-5101005-a7b21b62a8-37bec76c43). It just takes $10 to help out but please [donate as much as you can give](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-384716-907214-5101005-a7b21b62a8-37bec76c43).

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. This email is going to be read by about 6,000 people. Since you’re reading this now, it will take YOU and all 5,999 others to help us hit our goal. [**Please pitch in $10 or more today and thank you so much!**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-384716-907214-5101005-a7b21b62a8-37bec76c43)

name: Team Kathy
subject: We need Dr. Fauci
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Let us list the ways:
|
---

| | **CNBC: "Coronavirus data has already disappeared after Trump administration shifted control from CDC"** Last week, data about the availability of hospital beds and intensive care units in the U.S. was taken down from the Center for Disease Control and Prevention's website after the Trump Administration shifted control of information away from the CDC. Since day one, President Trump has promoted a false narrative of this health crisis and now, his Administration is interfering with critical information in the midst of a devastating pandemic. **And here 's why: Trump has failed us.** Trump downplayed the seriousness of the coronavirus, delayed our country's response to it, and has led a coordinated effort to discredit Dr. Anthony Fauci, our country's top expert on infectious disease. The Trump Administration's every decision during this crisis has only further jeopardized the Americans' health and safety. [_**We need leaders who are serious about protecting Americans ' health and well-being, and we need leaders who will fight to protect access to critical health care. If you agree, add your name and stand with Kathy.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2ef/3d199a51/2f52bea0/7364dadf/1525354625/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200720pet_b") When we cast our ballots this November, we're voting for the future of health care. Kathy got into this race because she knows firsthand how important access to health care is for American families. When Kathy's daughter was sick with a chronic illness, _their insurance company said her treatment would cost $10,000 a month._ **That 's not OK.** House Democrats have been a key line of defense against Washington Republicans' endless assault on health care. That's why it's essential that we not only defend the House Majority but that we expand it. Kathy is fighting to protect and expand health care, make it more affordable, safeguard protections for pre-existing conditions, and lower the cost of prescription drugs. [_**That 's the kind of leadership we need today and going forward. Add your name today and stand with Kathy as we fight to protect health care for all Americans.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2ef/3d199a51/2f52bea0/7364dadf/1525354625/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200720pet_b") Thanks, Team Kathy |

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Portland Leaders Plead: End the Violence, Let’s Talk
body:
A passel of community leaders and activists begged for an end to the violence in Portland that has gripped the city for nearly 2 months | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7d915714ee&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Portland Leaders Plead: End the Violence, Let’s Talk**

“About 15 hours after rioters broke into the building that houses the Portland Police Association offices and set a fire, a passel of community leaders and activists begged for an end to the violence that has gripped the city for nearly 2 months,” Wayne Havrelly writes for Portland’s KOIN News.

The city’s “leadership has, for months, lost control of the anarchists and agitators,” President Trump [tweeted yesterday](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=23b9cc580a&e=3ee4985eea). “We must protect Federal property, AND OUR PEOPLE. These were not merely protesters, these are the real deal!”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=39c7b0cf3b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “More and more experts agree on one thing: Kids will suffer if schools don’t open this fall. The prestigious National Academies of Science, Engineering and Medicine are the latest to issue a report calling for in-person instruction, saying remote learning is simply ineffective for younger and special-needs students,” the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0db8b8cc53&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “I want to return to my classroom,” one teacher writes. “I want to ensure that [my students] not only get the best education I can provide them, but also make sure that they are growing in the ways they need to be. That is not something we can ensure in a virtual environment,” Joe Cunningham writes for _[RedState](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4961f1b82e&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|
---
| “On the day my mother and I became citizens and said the Pledge of Allegiance in a room full of new Americans, there were few dry eyes in the house. Don’t end our patriotic displays because an influential fringe has decided they are somehow evil,” Karol Markowicz writes in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=304d089a30&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ec1e452ad2&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5360f6f2b1&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=0e45d4531d)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Team Eugene
subject: Tell Scott Perry → Stand With Pennsylvania Workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
Scott Perry continues to stifle progress and stand with his special interest backers instead of the people of PA-10.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18333034/225122724/462758527?refcode=em_pet_2020.07.20_b1_te_all-nd&refcode2=86ff42eb-c7ca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmZmNDJlYi1jN2NhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5cJUTrDnge3anTQo74NALVP1KXAZENcqbf6t9-BXHOo=)
Team,

Earlier this month, the House passed sweeping bipartisan legislation to modernize and rebuild America’s crumbling infrastructure. During the initial drafting of the bill, Scott Perry had the opportunity to be a voice for Pennsylvania’s workers, the environment, and moving our country forward.

**Instead, Scott Perry used the opportunity to propose changes to the bill that would kill blue-collar jobs and lower wages for workers in South Central PA and across the country.** He proposed eliminating funding for key transit projects, eliminating worker protections, and making it harder for contractors to qualify for minimum wage payments.

[**It’s clear that Scott Perry isn’t interested in representing the hard-working people of our community. Sign our petition to tell him to put PA’s workers, not Washington special interests, first >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18333035/225122725/-1006103688?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmZmNDJlYi1jN2NhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5cJUTrDnge3anTQo74NALVP1KXAZENcqbf6t9-BXHOo=&emci=1aae4ab2-bcca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=86ff42eb-c7ca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=10203249) | [Stand with workers](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18333036/225122726/-1006103688?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmZmNDJlYi1jN2NhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5cJUTrDnge3anTQo74NALVP1KXAZENcqbf6t9-BXHOo=&emci=1aae4ab2-bcca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=86ff42eb-c7ca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=10203249)
---

Not only did Perry blatantly dismiss the needs of America’s workers, he also attempted to quash important provisions to protect our environment like investing in green transportation projects and reducing carbon emissions, putting our health and safety at risk.

**We have the opportunity right now to revitalize transportation and infrastructure, strengthen our economy, create green jobs, and prioritize the health and safety of people in our community.** But Scott Perry continues to stifle progress and stand with his special interest backers instead of the people of PA-10.

[**South Central Pennsylvanians deserve better. clean_body: Scott Perry continues to stifle progress and stand with his special interest backers instead of the people of PA-10. = Team, Earlier this month, the House passed sweeping bipartisan legislation to modernize and rebuild America’s crumbling infrastructure. During the initial drafting of the bill, Scott Perry had the opportunity to be a voice for Pennsylvania’s workers, the environment, and moving our country forward. Instead, Scott Perry used the opportunity to propose changes to the bill that would kill blue-collar jobs and lower wages for workers in South Central PA and across the country. He proposed eliminating funding for key transit projects, eliminating worker protections, and making it harder for contractors to qualify for minimum wage payments. | Not only did Perry blatantly dismiss the needs of America’s workers, he also attempted to quash important provisions to protect our environment like investing in green transportation projects and reducing carbon emissions, putting our health and safety at risk. We have the opportunity right now to revitalize transportation and infrastructure, strengthen our economy, create green jobs, and prioritize the health and safety of people in our community. But Scott Perry continues to stifle progress and stand with his special interest backers instead of the people of PA-10.
