We are officially just 50 days out from our primary, and I need your help! Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/5dd13b52104b9af8/24ae4d02071fd1c1c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, We’re getting close, and I can already feel the anticipation and excitement of beating Jeanne Shaheen on election night. But before we get there, we have to win our primary. We are now just 50 days out, and have only hours left to meet our goal for our **50 Days Fundraising Drive**. We still need to raise $924 before 11:59 p.m. to make a huge stand that New Hampshire isn’t going to stand for politics as usual anymore. **[Will you please rush your donation of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or what you can now so that we can crush our goal?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/5dd13b52104b9af8/d527726b4dcf28fec3d6b838967d376c/33153)** It’s important that we enter these crucial days with a needed boost. We are grinding, and I can tell you I love a challenge. The momentum we have gained makes me wake up every day even more motivated and confident than the day before. Now that we are in the home stretch, we need to work even harder to show that Granite Staters are ready for a change. **Unlike Senator Shaheen, I am not a career politician. I don’t need to go to Washington for a paycheck. I want to go because I love America, and want to preserve the liberty and freedom that helped me achieve the American Dream**. Our kids and grandkids deserve to have the same opportunities we did, yet we are stealing it away by dragging our great country down the path of socialism. As your next U.S. Senator from New Hampshire, I will stand strong with President Trump and his America First agenda. Will you stand with me now? **[Donate $5 to stop socialism in America!>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/5dd13b52104b9af8/0b9a710fe2aeab66c3d6b838967d376c/33153) **

We are now just 50 days out, and have only hours left to meet our goal for our 50 Days Fundraising Drive. We still need to raise $924 before 11:59 p.m. to make a huge stand that New Hampshire isn’t going to stand for politics as usual anymore. It’s important that we enter these crucial days with a needed boost. We are grinding, and I can tell you I love a challenge. The momentum we have gained makes me wake up every day even more motivated and confident than the day before. Now that we are in the home stretch, we need to work even harder to show that Granite Staters are ready for a change. Unlike Senator Shaheen, I am not a career politician. I don’t need to go to Washington for a paycheck. I want to go because I love America, and want to preserve the liberty and freedom that helped me achieve the American Dream. Our kids and grandkids deserve to have the same opportunities we did, yet we are stealing it away by dragging our great country down the path of socialism. As your next U.S. Senator from New Hampshire, I will stand strong with President Trump and his America First agenda. Will you stand with me now? These are trying times, but I believe in our nation and our founding principles of liberty and freedom. I believe we will get through this, and come out even better on the other side. But we’re going to have to do it together. Thanks for your support, Corky Messner | | | ---|--- id:2020-07-14-17:06:01:893t PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE

name: Grayson for Georgia
subject: My Promise to Serve -
body:
| | | [](http://www.graysonforga.com/?e=5855d13074ae510bef70273231986a0d&utm_source=graysonforga&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=promisetoserve&n=1)
---
| Friend --

Note that when politicians refer to themselves, they use the word "Leader". They are supposed to be public civil servants, not your leaders. I've never used that word in any campaign speech in reference to myself. Help elect Derrick Grayson for US Senate and I promise: 1\. 100% of the Constitution, 100% of the Time. 2\. I will serve only 1 term and accomplish more than any other by letting you, the People, exercise the Power that the Constitution gives you to limit government. The power is yours, not theirs and nor will it be mine. 3\. My first two Bills will be to Repeal the 16th Amendment in lieu of The FairTax and Repeal of the Vaccine Act of '86. [](https://www.graysonforga.com/donate?e=5855d13074ae510bef70273231986a0d&utm_source=graysonforga&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=promisetoserve&n=2 "DONATE") [](https://www.graysonforga.com/volunteer?e=5855d13074ae510bef70273231986a0d&utm_source=graysonforga&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=promisetoserve&n=3 "VOLUNTEER") 4\. I promise to expose anyone trying to pass Mandatory Vaccines so that you may exercise your Power with the knowledge of who is not in DC serving, but rather seeking their own gains. 5\. I will lead the charge on your behalf to ensuring the TRUTH about Corona is made known to all who will listen. You deserve your ability to work and the freedom to socialize as intended by the United States Constitution, not politicians. Witness the path that we are on here in Georgia. Stores now requiring masks in order to shop. What's next? Mandatory vaccines. [https://www.wabe.org/list-which-retailers-are-requiring-face-mask-coverings-in-georgia/?fbclid=IwAR2x9iWaNAbjJyqf5_4Xy35MIBrsovEgI8-CTNluq_GGZUAg0l5KE-uSXaU](https://www.graysonforga.com/r?u=FlxPna_HXWgwGss3bhJv4gOEaQ3awsz2bMKWlOlWMHCXuQwoU_K3ZSCk3ujOfIHsDrPLk0HUm-Pbugfup_pMn38AQ9gH39Z5tGss2alnTkN-p12t7wdM_11JdGjeBlrxmzbLklyT78sCKg5sl5JlnPzJ3WxpbXziX5r_Qx_ZDbK7NBR2piHUOGSWRr8AV33hN7v1GikB2T5839s5SsZqcQ&e=5855d13074ae510bef70273231986a0d&utm_source=graysonforga&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=promisetoserve&n=4) Please donate any amount today!

Help me, Help Trump, Help you. Grayson for Georgia

name: Allen Chen
subject: we’re on the ground fighting to protect our children
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Last week, the White House revealed that they were willing to put our children’s safety at risk in order to reopen schools -- and since then, our campaign has been on the ground and working with our communities to understand parents’ concerns and fight for something better.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18333333/225129033/-1290848981?refcode=em_pet_2020.07.20_AC_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWEyMGRmZC1jYWNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dZXj65rwUqZ1lunPFicwioVBqBBAWUKBKfYknoMGx_s=)
---
| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18333334/225129034/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWEyMGRmZC1jYWNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dZXj65rwUqZ1lunPFicwioVBqBBAWUKBKfYknoMGx_s=&emci=219278c6-bbca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=f9a20dfd-caca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *
Friend,

Last week, the White House revealed that they were willing to put our children’s safety at risk in order to reopen schools -- _and since then, our campaign has been on the ground and working with our communities to understand parents’ concerns and fight for something better._

**Friend, we need to protect our children. It’s that simple.**

Health experts are warning us every day that it’s too soon to fully reopen, and that opening schools without a resolution will result in more cases. According to studies, at least a quarter of all teachers are at risk of contracting COVID, and over three million households have an elderly family member and a school-aged child living together, putting them at risk.

[**That’s why Sri is calling on Congress to pass legislation that protects our communities as we face the prospect of a new school year --_and friend, we need you to add your name next to ours._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18333335/225129035/5088425?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWEyMGRmZC1jYWNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dZXj65rwUqZ1lunPFicwioVBqBBAWUKBKfYknoMGx_s=&emci=219278c6-bbca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=f9a20dfd-caca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=14145524) | [Sign the petition ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18333336/225129036/-1285387991?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWEyMGRmZC1jYWNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dZXj65rwUqZ1lunPFicwioVBqBBAWUKBKfYknoMGx_s=&emci=219278c6-bbca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=f9a20dfd-caca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=14145524)
---
It is disgraceful that we’re ignoring the facts and our health experts and considering reopening schools -- _but considering that Donald Trump and the special interests surrounding him are actively downplaying this pandemic, we shouldn’t be surprised._

We need strong leaders that will listen to our public health experts and propose a plan of action that will save lives.

[**Congress must put forth a plan of action for the new school year that will benefit our children, but is based on science and facts and will protect our health. Add your name if you agree >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18333337/225129037/5088425?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWEyMGRmZC1jYWNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dZXj65rwUqZ1lunPFicwioVBqBBAWUKBKfYknoMGx_s=&emci=219278c6-bbca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=f9a20dfd-caca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=14145524)
[Sign the petition ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18333338/225129038/-1285387991?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWEyMGRmZC1jYWNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dZXj65rwUqZ1lunPFicwioVBqBBAWUKBKfYknoMGx_s=&emci=219278c6-bbca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=f9a20dfd-caca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=14145524)
---

Let’s keep fighting,

**Allen Chen**
Campaign Manager
Team Sri

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18333339/225129039/-1290848981?refcode=em_pet_2020.07.20_AC_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWEyMGRmZC1jYWNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dZXj65rwUqZ1lunPFicwioVBqBBAWUKBKfYknoMGx_s=)

**Sri Preston Kulkarni** is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | [Help send Sri to Congress! ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18333340/225129040/-1290848981?refcode=em_pet_2020.07.20_AC_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWEyMGRmZC1jYWNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dZXj65rwUqZ1lunPFicwioVBqBBAWUKBKfYknoMGx_s=)
---
* * *
Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at [sri2020.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18333341/225129041/307941387?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWEyMGRmZC1jYWNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dZXj65rwUqZ1lunPFicwioVBqBBAWUKBKfYknoMGx_s=&emci=219278c6-bbca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=f9a20dfd-caca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=14145524)
| Paid for by Sri for Congress
---

SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898

If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/219278c6-bbca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0/f9a20dfd-caca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWEyMGRmZC1jYWNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dZXj65rwUqZ1lunPFicwioVBqBBAWUKBKfYknoMGx_s=&id=117373579).

Friend,

What are you doing on July 29th?

I’m hosting a very important lunch and I want YOU and a guest of your choice to join me for a very important strategy discussion.

name: Joe Biden HQ
subject: Dr. Fauci's credibility is under attack. Will you say you trust him?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Right now, with Dr. Fauci's credibility under attack, we want to show how many people believe in him. |
---
Peter, you might have seen this headline last week: **" As coronavirus surges, Trump and White House attack Fauci" \- PBS NewsHour** Donald Trump needs to spend less time playing golf and attacking Dr. Anthony Fauci, and more time listening to public health experts like him.

If Joe Biden is elected, he'll reach out immediately to Dr. Fauci and ask him to continue his incredible service to our country.

Right now, with Dr. Fauci's credibility under attack, we want to show how many people believe in him, trust scientists, and back Joe's pledge to listen to experts to combat the coronavirus.

[We need 50,000 Americans to add their voice and say they support Joe's pledge to listen to experts like Dr. Fauci, and lead with science. Will you be one of them, Peter?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b86b/1cd0ac28/1703c4b0a/357d8ddd/3410220170/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/stand-with-dr-fauci?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.20_B2_fauci_X__F1_S2_C2__full_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.20_B2_fauci_X__F1_S2_C2__full_T2") | [SAY YOU'RE WITH JOE ->](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b86b/1cd0ac28/1703c4b0a/357d8ddd/3410220170/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/stand-with-dr-fauci?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.20_B2_fauci_X__F1_S2_C2__full_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.20_B2_fauci_X__F1_S2_C2__full_T2")
---
Trump's disgusting attempt to pass the buck by blaming the top infectious disease expert in the country -- whose advice he repeatedly ignored -- is yet another horrible and revealing failure of leadership.

As Trump continues to refuse to take responsibility and lead, Joe Biden is stepping up in his place.

He's laid out plans for how to combat the coronavirus and rebuild our economy in its wake -- including the key step of believing and empowering experts like Dr. Fauci.

[So, Peter, will you help us show the country how many people are ready for real, national leadership again? Add your name to say you're with Joe in backing Dr. Fauci, and scientific experts to lead us through this crisis:](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b86b/1cd0ac28/1703c4b0a/357d8ddd/3410220170/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/stand-with-dr-fauci?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.20_B2_fauci_X__F1_S2_C2__full_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.20_B2_fauci_X__F1_S2_C2__full_T2")
[SAY YOU'RE WITH JOE ->](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b86b/1cd0ac28/1703c4b0a/357d8ddd/3410220170/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/stand-with-dr-fauci?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.20_B2_fauci_X__F1_S2_C2__full_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.20_B2_fauci_X__F1_S2_C2__full_T2")
---
Thank you for fighting alongside us,

Joe Biden HQ
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b86b/1cd0ac28/1703c4b0a/357d8ddc/3410220170/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b86b/1cd0ac28/1703c4b0a/357d8ddb/3410220170/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b86b/1cd0ac28/1703c4b0a/357d8dda/3410220170/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b86b/1cd0ac28/1703c4b0a/357d8dd9/3410220170/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b86b/1cd0ac28/1703c4b0a/357d8dd8/3410220170/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b86b/1cd0ac28/1703c4b0a/357d8dd7/3410220170/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b86b/1cd0ac28/1703c4b0a/357d8dd6/3410220170/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b86b/1cd0ac28/1703c4b0a/357d8dd5/3410220170/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b86b/1cd0ac28/1703c4b0a/357d8dd4/3410220170/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b86b/1cd0ac28/1703c4b0a/357d8dd3/3410220170/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b86b/1cd0ac28/1703c4b0a/357d8dd6/3410220170/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b86b/1cd0ac28/1703c4b0a/357d8dd2/3410220170/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b86b/1cd0ac28/1703c4b0a/357d8dd5/3410220170/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b86b/1cd0ac28/1703c4b0a/357d8dd1/3410220170/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Rob Portman
subject: Defend, not Defund
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
For the last few months, we’ve watched how our frontline workers have held our nation together. Our doctors, nurses, firefighters, paramedics, and.... Peter, For the last few months, we’ve watched how our frontline workers have held our nation together. Our doctors, nurses, firefighters, paramedics, and police officers have been the first ones to answer the call to help, sacrificing their health and wellbeing, day in and day out. Law enforcement officers just trying to keep the peace have sometimes been attacked by rioters. But what does the Radical-Left want to do in response to these unacceptable acts? They want to defund them. They want to DISMANTLE the police. To be clear, police brutality against communities of color is wrong and should never happen again. I have consistently spoken out against it. The police officers I know agree and support responsible reforms in police practices and training methods. But the radical Far-Left is now trying to DEFUND our police departments. Just weeks ago, my colleagues and I in the Senate worked tirelessly to put together a responsible police reform bill, but the Far-Left chose to block the Senate from even having a conversation or debate about this. The Far-Left chose partisanship over working across the aisle to agree on common sense legislation that would provide better training, increased transparency, and stronger accountability for our police departments. Peter, I need you to understand how extreme this is: The Far-Left Radical Mob wants to DEFUND our police departments around the nation. **[We must come together and STOP the Radical-Left in their tracks – immediately. Can you help me fight back by chipping in whatever you are able clean_body: For the last few months, we’ve watched how our frontline workers have held our nation together. Our doctors, nurses, firefighters, paramedics, and.... Peter, For the last few months, we’ve watched how our frontline workers have held our nation together. Our doctors, nurses, firefighters, paramedics, and police officers have been the first ones to answer the call to help, sacrificing their health and wellbeing, day in and day out. Law enforcement officers just trying to keep the peace have sometimes been attacked by rioters. But what does the Radical-Left want to do in response to these unacceptable acts? They want to defund them. They want to DISMANTLE the police. To be clear, police brutality against communities of color is wrong and should never happen again. I have consistently spoken out against it. The police officers I know agree and support responsible reforms in police practices and training methods. But the radical Far-Left is now trying to DEFUND our police departments. Just weeks ago, my colleagues and I in the Senate worked tirelessly to put together a responsible police reform bill, but the Far-Left chose to block the Senate from even having a conversation or debate about this. The Far-Left chose partisanship over working across the aisle to agree on common sense legislation that would provide better training, increased transparency, and stronger accountability for our police departments. Peter, I need you to understand how extreme this is: The Far-Left Radical Mob wants to DEFUND our police departments around the nation. Peter, will you do what you can RIGHT NOW to help show the Radical-Left that they and their extremist ideals have no place here in Ohio? \-- Rob Portman Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate

| | | **Jackie Walorski wants American workers to “find something new”**
---
| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=b3598b1063&e=5886ca081d)
---
| Friend,

The challenges facing American workers right now are of a magnitude not seen since the Great Depression. Millions are on unemployment, furloughed, or have seen reduced hours, and there’s no comprehensive plan coming out of the White House.

Jackie Walorski recently showered Ivanka Trump with praise for launching a website that tells millions of unemployed Americans to “find something new.” The tone deafness of Jackie is stunning. Jackie’s privilege and complete disconnect with the reality of struggling American workers, who can’t just “find something new,” is emblematic of her entire tenure in office.

[**We have another path forward as a country: the opportunity to rebuild a more sustainable and resilient economy geared toward the demands of the moment and future.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=83c167aa27&e=5886ca081d)
---
| [INVEST IN A BETTER PATH FORWARD →](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=beb91e7d96&e=5886ca081d "INVEST IN A BETTER PATH FORWARD →")
---
| The environmental-economic plan put forward by Vice President Biden last week meets the needs of the moment by proposing aggressive climate targets that will only be achieved through significant investment in the American workforce. Revitalizing our economy in concert with protecting our planet is the path forward.

People are suffering. We need bold leadership, policy, and action—not inane statements.

name: Steph Houghton, Team Michelle
subject: Have you voted on a design yet?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
We're getting ready to print bumper stickers, so people can show off their support of Michelle in a fun and easy way.
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. name: Stacey Abrams Alert (via Blue Georgia)
subject: Abrams needs Democrats like you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate
| | |

Friend, we were starting to think we were toast.

The GOP was raising MILLIONS to buy this Senate seat in Georgia, and our grassroots support wasn't where it needed to be to fight back.
**But then Stacey Abrams asked you to support this campaign to elect Reverend Warnock ... and donations SKYROCKETED!**
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5be/288179be/999d8d5/348e7a49/1175984444/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNDIzLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk423-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
But now we're up against another critical midnight deadline - and with time running out, we're still falling incredibly short of our $50,000 goal. We need Democrats like you to act NOW - **or else, we could lose our chance to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate. **
Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can take back the Senate this November, and _The Washington Post_ __ says winning in Georgia is KEY - but we can only get it done by hitting every single fundraising goal.
Even with Kelly Loeffler (R) flooding this race with $20 million of her own fortune, polling now shows this race in a dead heat. **That 's why we're counting on you to follow Stacey's lead and chip in right now - before time runs out: [_Please, give $5 or more now - as much as you can spare - before midnight tonight to help us win this race, flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate!_](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5be/288179be/999d8d5/348e7a49/1175984444/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNDIzLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk423-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18335235/225181372/721416609?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDhiNjhlYy1lMGNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pjw70251wH0zcbcH0AkX82BfjaUKke1iGmqdf9ACL_o=)
| | Hey team,

If there’s a state that’s been top of mind for Democrats this election cycle, it’s [Texas](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18335236/225181373/-1338831707?refcode=EM_FR_B1_072020_AC_NATL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDhiNjhlYy1lMGNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pjw70251wH0zcbcH0AkX82BfjaUKke1iGmqdf9ACL_o=).

From NPR reporters to Quinnipiac polling experts, everyone is calling Texas a battleground state and a “toss-up.” [It’s not a matter of if Democrats can win—it’s a matter of when. And if we win Texas, you can bet we’ll flip the Senate too.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18335237/225181374/-1338831707?refcode=EM_FR_B1_072020_AC_NATL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDhiNjhlYy1lMGNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pjw70251wH0zcbcH0AkX82BfjaUKke1iGmqdf9ACL_o=)

So I’d like you to meet MJ Hegar. She’s a combat veteran, a working mom, and a Texas-tough Democrat running for U.S. Senate.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18335238/225181375/-1338831707?refcode=EM_FR_B1_072020_AC_NATL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDhiNjhlYy1lMGNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pjw70251wH0zcbcH0AkX82BfjaUKke1iGmqdf9ACL_o=)
Just last week, MJ won the Democratic primary runoff, setting up a fight this November between her and Senator John Cornyn, [who has been Mitch McConnell’s right hand in obstructing progress on health care, tax reform, immigration, and more.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18335239/225181376/-1338831707?refcode=EM_FR_B1_072020_AC_NATL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDhiNjhlYy1lMGNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pjw70251wH0zcbcH0AkX82BfjaUKke1iGmqdf9ACL_o=)

Cornyn spent the last 18 years in Washington cozying up to special interests instead of serving Texans. Now polls are showing shockingly low approval ratings: [as low as 29% in one poll, and ten points below Ted Cruz in another!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18335240/225181377/-1338831707?refcode=EM_FR_B1_072020_AC_NATL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDhiNjhlYy1lMGNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pjw70251wH0zcbcH0AkX82BfjaUKke1iGmqdf9ACL_o=)

[MJ Hegar has a real chance of winning this election, but she needs all the support we can gather to beat the GOP’s dark-money machine and flip the Senate. Will you chip in today to make it happen?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18335241/225181378/-1338831707?refcode=EM_FR_B1_072020_AC_NATL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDhiNjhlYy1lMGNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pjw70251wH0zcbcH0AkX82BfjaUKke1iGmqdf9ACL_o=)
---
| | [CHIP IN TO FLIP TEXAS BLUE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18335242/225181379/-1338831707?refcode=EM_FR_B1_072020_AC_NATL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDhiNjhlYy1lMGNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pjw70251wH0zcbcH0AkX82BfjaUKke1iGmqdf9ACL_o=)
---
Let me tell you a bit more about MJ. She’s a combat veteran with a record of service to our country, and she’s faced the struggles so many Americans do—from wondering how she’ll keep her family’s health care to overcoming gun violence. She’s a proven leader, and I know she’ll be a tireless advocate for American families, small businesses, and the middle class.

[Her opponent couldn't be more different:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18335243/225181380/-1338831707?refcode=EM_FR_B1_072020_AC_NATL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDhiNjhlYy1lMGNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pjw70251wH0zcbcH0AkX82BfjaUKke1iGmqdf9ACL_o=) John Cornyn has spent years as the #2 ranking Republican in the Senate and is one of Mitch McConnell’s top allies. Politico even called John “Repeal’s Top Salesman” for his efforts to gut the Affordable Care Act.

Lately, he’s been working overtime to undermine the response to the COVID-19 pandemic. While he’s been making jokes on Twitter and spreading misinformation,[Texas has become a hotspot of skyrocketing cases, leaving thousands of his constituents in harm’s way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18335244/225181381/-1338831707?refcode=EM_FR_B1_072020_AC_NATL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDhiNjhlYy1lMGNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pjw70251wH0zcbcH0AkX82BfjaUKke1iGmqdf9ACL_o=)

[It’s time for Texans to have new representation. clean_body: = | | Hey team, If there’s a state that’s been top of mind for Democrats this election cycle, it’s =. From NPR reporters to Quinnipiac polling experts, everyone is calling Texas a battleground state and a “toss-up.” = So I’d like you to meet MJ Hegar. She’s a combat veteran, a working mom, and a Texas-tough Democrat running for U.S. Senate. = Just last week, MJ won the Democratic primary runoff, setting up a fight this November between her and Senator John Cornyn, = Cornyn spent the last 18 years in Washington cozying up to special interests instead of serving Texans. Now polls are showing shockingly low approval ratings: = = | | = Let me tell you a bit more about MJ. She’s a combat veteran with a record of service to our country, and she’s faced the struggles so many Americans do—from wondering how she’ll keep her family’s health care to overcoming gun violence. She’s a proven leader, and I know she’ll be a tireless advocate for American families, small businesses, and the middle class. = John Cornyn has spent years as the #2 ranking Republican in the Senate and is one of Mitch McConnell’s top allies. Politico even called John “Repeal’s Top Salesman” for his efforts to gut the Affordable Care Act. Lately, he’s been working overtime to undermine the response to the COVID-19 pandemic. While he’s been making jokes on Twitter and spreading misinformation,= = = | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Michael Thank you for being a part of Michael’s re-election campaign!** Sending emails is a crucial way to keep supporters like you updated on what Michael is doing in Colorado and Washington D.C. to fight for progress in a purple state. Plus, this campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters like you! = | | = Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. Peter -- In Sen. Cornyn, we have a senator who says one thing and does another. Sen. Cornyn has been talking for YEARS about how we need to update our immigration system, but his actions tell a different story.

When he had the chance in 2006 to support a bipartisan bill spearheaded by John McCain that would allow for a path to citizenship for immigrant workers, **he fought _AGAINST_ it.**

When he got the chance in 2013 to support another bipartisan bill that would protect DREAMers living in Texas, modernize our border security, and help fix the immigration system he decried for so long, **he voted _AGAINST_ it** along with his boss, Mitch McConnell.

Now he's doing NOTHING about an executive order that put a halt to most work visas, which will harm immigrants and the Texas economy that so many immigrants contribute to every single day! Our country, culture, and economy are built on immigrants, and you can be sure that when MJ is elected, she won't just TALK about reforming immigration, she'll DO SOMETHING about it.

**She needs your help to defeat Sen. Cornyn -- will you pitch in to help her win?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

body:
Four years ago today, Eric launched his famous 2016 ‘106-day’ campaign and made Indiana history. We barnstormed across the state and created... | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0bd231b44b8e44f49aa7d804450bdd02&_e=blBrcNlaarYtAl7zJCzFxJSvHbojmd08YRro6i7hZv6dOsrUCzXvWJMdLUjFB_6Fuv4wh8wIBj6s2Sx-d4TObJ7NufZlj6W6CXfUi8XOeL-vL04pIwOg_OD2Pz4LJAIlHvUwdmpu5J7t9064wbMC-Egi3O9u4EEPkJuyS-ovYuC70GhvMzmwKb3b7toomKKQlokcWcGdZxdGvEHwZgidcUBn4_6h2IbbwW3uf7gog_030of0t_SRhMNyEZHrj6wY-H2c8Rl5mNXP9kn4aNSLQfsDAA84M1Dj0YKuRuD5YjflsuUGkDhzXxWmNWHeB_9K5uEU7t9649DTIKVd3gLz4nmwrgVoZAQv-YvCa0hZ_My1WIfcRnqLIaOKxsFg0ZTak2w4vtvUpBe-Eslw9-r4x0yT5Ytum1Zi9p1aPfCsLtuHCbtG3fnsFf5WTK-2Joytf6UcCaft1mtSARpKczEXY2o4xgy8RvtbLJ9BPaAOIKM%3D) |
---|---|---
Friend,

**We can’t believe it, but there are only 106 days left until Election Day 2020. **

_Four years ago, Eric had just 106 days to run a full gubernatorial campaign, and in those 106 days, he made Hoosier history. _
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0bd231b44b8e44f49aa7d804450bdd02&_e=blBrcNlaarYtAl7zJCzFxJSvHbojmd08YRro6i7hZv6dOsrUCzXvWJMdLUjFB_6Fuv4wh8wIBj6s2Sx-d4TObJ7NufZlj6W6CXfUi8XOeL-vL04pIwOg_OD2Pz4LJAIlHvUwdmpu5J7t9064wbMC-Egi3O9u4EEPkJuyS-ovYuC70GhvMzmwKb3b7toomKKQlokcWcGdZxdGvEHwZgidcUBn4_6h2IbbwW3uf7gog_030of0t_SRhMNyEZHrj6wY-H2c8Rl5mNXP9kn4aNSLQftanPkrRcls4yM9KhnBUQuIxpwhfP494Ja21DIlqhj5TVDB-G5Hsj1yqraHmPIqqKkcFd8rR_pVDv-AaxePUQN30Idq9sSL2m9ffTfan09Ft2_LIAJ0xdfVoDlmdN3FH0ZjJ_QQNdv3VOa98kDNs2Ljb2xPXkdmofrW580I8bbERVe26rpolZKWWNOQYeqZMSXX5I0S14DKM-wguaKvzMg%3D)
[**Sign up and volunteer!**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0bd231b44b8e44f49aa7d804450bdd02&_e=blBrcNlaarYtAl7zJCzFxJSvHbojmd08YRro6i7hZv6dOsrUCzXvWJMdLUjFB_6Fuv4wh8wIBj6s2Sx-d4TObJ7NufZlj6W6CXfUi8XOeL-vL04pIwOg_OD2Pz4LJAIlHvUwdmpu5J7t9064wbMC-Egi3O9u4EEPkJuyS-ovYuC70GhvMzmwKb3b7toomKKQlokcWcGdZxdGvEHwZgidcUBn4_6h2IbbwW3uf7gog_030of0t_SRhMNyEZHrj6wY-H2c8Rl5mNXP9kn4aNSLQe3WRS1PuVXSLwHG-LAwNrhQuVm33DgYwTOuz_STT3j-GCkxR1n31Q4c2T_hzVib8qnjjzEXTEm5u3kK9pE-MoeP5kCybRcl3eBQqZw4ppqkKeFP_PCKkp-xd9TPLBQ8N2ZQdWMkLy_04-S8KaeNfQ1hXxByC_h78q6uuBCkRtgr9OToeYHVv-5AMbhgjP9jsEkfH4IqSU4Pv_TmQzw2Uqs%3D)
_We barnstormed across the state, and assembled an incredible team. Together, Hoosiers in all 92 counties came together and did what they said couldn’t be done in just 106 days. We created a movement that continues today around a simple idea — building One Indiana for All._

And, friend, we never looked back.

While we’ve seen some tough times over the last couple of months, we’re proud of how far Indiana has come. We were setting records before the COVID-19 pandemic hit, and trust us — we’ll be setting them again soon.

**But just like in 2016, we can’t take anything for granted. **

We’ll need the help of Hoosiers across the state over the next 106 days, which is why we’re reaching out right now.

_We’re looking for 106 Hoosiers to sign up and volunteer for us during the homestretch. _

_**[Can we count on you to come through for us over the next 106 days? We need Hoosiers to contact voters, display yard signs, and everything in between?](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0bd231b44b8e44f49aa7d804450bdd02&_e=blBrcNlaarYtAl7zJCzFxJSvHbojmd08YRro6i7hZv6dOsrUCzXvWJMdLUjFB_6Fuv4wh8wIBj6s2Sx-d4TObJ7NufZlj6W6CXfUi8XOeL-vL04pIwOg_OD2Pz4LJAIlHvUwdmpu5J7t9064wbMC-Egi3O9u4EEPkJuyS-ovYuC70GhvMzmwKb3b7toomKKQlokcWcGdZxdGvEHwZgidcUBn4_6h2IbbwW3uf7gog_030of0t_SRhMNyEZHrj6wY-H2c8Rl5mNXP9kn4aNSLQSd_D_mrpF_DIkf2FU4HbmkkjY2xvPuoKefd1mMf7U5IRguBDllnENSu1sk2lQT_mJtHxLqmoVkXUZE48QlSTINHgzaw0_8gptifmJ7EIniN1p2BO7cbq_eYsPoxBFkAQk3pTPI-DXyvZ6WRWqxFk572ow84ex1Oqj3Ctuv-1AHg_unKcssLpzPrCVtP_JL5jkYhwkLqam6EyhKrvUIfQGE%3D)**_

Sign up to volunteer at this link: **[https://secure.holcombforindiana.com/volunteer-95753/holcomb-crew/volunteer](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0bd231b44b8e44f49aa7d804450bdd02&_e=blBrcNlaarYtAl7zJCzFxJSvHbojmd08YRro6i7hZv6dOsrUCzXvWJMdLUjFB_6Fuv4wh8wIBj6s2Sx-d4TObJ7NufZlj6W6CXfUi8XOeL-vL04pIwOg_OD2Pz4LJAIlHvUwdmpu5J7t9064wbMC-Egi3O9u4EEPkJuyS-ovYuC70GhvMzmwKb3b7toomKKQlokcWcGdZxdGvEHwZgidcUBn4_6h2IbbwW3uf7gog_030of0t_SRhMNyEZHrj6wY-H2c8Rl5mNXP9kn4aNSLQVdtSekIVYhjPhuO9_RBX05vX3LL1_NiMtxjXqoGk-RNQKmrYqpnR9EK66X7YDqea6q4ThYj8iQAZUpJ5Z973sF6SlMXs6zAIfQny0TuqtaqKxY-z4tvv0iftM8XM-fi84N2PhHR2-1dvCdu8qCYUxacg9Du0DfqQUmzJQRVpKTeJC6lcc76qccICIwMYOeGrXcm_nDhweQw7UPLMbsJ7HE%3D)**

Thank you for your support,

Holcomb Crew

name: =?utf-8?Q?Christianna=20Dyer?=
subject: Your weekly #TeamDani update!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cca51c72ad19/your-weekly-teamdani-update?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Hello, Team Dani! Hope you all are getting ready for this week! There's a lot of exciting events on the calendar:
* First up... We have an **Indivisible Unity event** with five Indivisible-endorsed candidates this Wednesday, July 22nd at 6 pm! We’re very proud to be in such good company. Come join us on Zoom!

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/indivisbleunity](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=2269a27745&e=140a9b81e7)
* And later in the week... We finally get to see all of your shining faces at our first outdoor event in months! We’re pairing up with Elizabeth Lindquist, a Winnebago County Board candidate, to jointly host **Grab a shake with Dani and Elizabeth** , on Saturday, July 25th at 2 pm!! We’ll be social distancing in the future park behind Dari Ripple in South Beloit.

[https://www.facebook.com/events/282792776263912/](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=ea7ca21f99&e=140a9b81e7) This week's UPDATES:
* We’re **HALFWAY** to reaching our goal of filling Soldier Field with voters we called by the end of the summer!
* You guys are amazingggggg! You contacted**5,966** people on the phone this week!!!

A new Personal Record for y'all!
* **MVP of the week award goes to** **Daniel L.** who made more than **650** of those calls!

**Some things to look forward to/stay tuned for...: **
* This week we’re continuing**LIT DROPS** throughout the district on Saturday 10-1 and 1-4 and Sunday 1-4 shifts. Additional times available!! Contact Marguerite ([Marguerite@daniforillinois.com](mailto:Marguerite@daniforillinois.com)) for more information and to get your shift set up!
* A “lit drop” is when we take our literature (fliers, etc.) to a door and drop it off at the house. It’s safer than door-to-door canvassing because we won’t be trying to speak with any voters at the door. **_We’ll provide masks and gloves for anyone interested! _**

A few standing reminders:
* **ITS SUMMER & ITS TIME TO PARTY!**: If you are interested in hosting a Virtual House Party for Dani, reach out to Marguerite at [marguerite@daniforillinois.com](mailto:marguerite@daniforillinois.com). We will walk you through it, and all you need to do is sit back with your happy hour drink of choice and invite your friends to do the same!
* While you’re still on the phone finishing phone banking, **CALL YOUR FRIENDS**! Everyone in your social circles has the potential to be an activist and volunteer right alongside you - you never know unless you ask!
* Want to be featured as a Volunteer Voice columnist? If you have helpful tips on effective outreach, send them my way!

**Volunteer Voice! ** The guest columnist this week is... Hannah W. _I like to go into calls with an open mind, you never know who you're going to get on the other line or the incredible conversations you might get to have with other people in the district about the things that matter most to them. Even if your goal for the day is just“ I want to have a few really meaningful conversations during calls”, I've found keeping that as your focus makes it a lot easier to stay motivated through the countless voicemail answering boxes. _
---
| | | | | | | [](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=1c1c2cc542&e=140a9b81e7)
---
| | [](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=58765af496&e=140a9b81e7)
---
| | [](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=7a6bc84f00&e=140a9b81e7)
---
| | [](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=2dc627e3b9&e=140a9b81e7)
---
| | Paid for by Dani for Illinois
---
|
---
|
**Our mailing address is:**
Dani for Illinois
PO Box 1671
LaSalle, IL 61301

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=7369c912a5&e=140a9b81e7) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=7369c912a5&e=140a9b81e7&c=6eeedb5faf).

name: Sandy Smith
subject: Picking Up Steam
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gLkAJsrzQ3Nxmng&b=9p4elRTvDCFoJOrfVG0L3A)
---
Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.**

I'm a fighter, and I will fight for America and against the radical Democrats. I'm pleased to announce that many other warriors have joined the fight alongside me! [Will join join the fight with us?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gLkAJsrzQ3Nxmng&b=9p4elRTvDCFoJOrfVG0L3A)
I am proud to announce the endorsement of a fellow North Carolina conservative woman, Virginia Foxx:
_“Being one of the few Republican women in Congress, I know first-hand how important it is to have strong conservative voices in Washington. Sandy Smith will be a great advocate for our conservative values and will be a strong fighter for North Carolina’s families. I fully support Sandy for United States Congress in North Carolina’s 1st Congressional district.**Sandy cares about the people of her district, she does what is right and won't back down from a fight. We need conservatives with a backbone like Sandy Smith.** ”_
[Do you agree with Congresswoman Foxx, that we need conservatives with a backbone?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gLkAJsrzQ3Nxmng&b=9p4elRTvDCFoJOrfVG0L3A) The radical Socialists we are fighting have no conscience and no limits. To defeat them we will need to stand strong with our faith and our ideals!
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gLkAJsrzQ3Nxmng&b=dm1DWbBVERj0fygpr5cVlQ)
---

**_But that's not all. Those who share our faith and our values, fighters against the Socialists, Family Research Council Action PAC has endorsed me as well!_**

_Dear Ms. Smith:_

_On behalf of FRC Action PAC, the political action committee connected with Family Research Council Action, it is my pleasure to announce our endorsement of your candidacy for the U.S. House of Representatives in North Carolina’s 1st Congressional District._

_Since its inception, FRC Action has supported candidates who take a strong stand for faith, family, and freedom. In this critical hour, Americans are looking for bold leaders who are willing to defend these values. From talking with you, evaluating your record, and speaking with those who know you, we believe you will be such a leader. You understand the fundamental importance of protecting the right to life, the central role strong families must play if our country is to thrive, and that religious liberty is the bedrock of a truly prosperous nation._

_From a young age, you have represented the value of hard work. Your entrepreneurial and adventurous spirit has enabled you to start several successful businesses. You also have a desire to serve others as evidenced by your community volunteer activities. And, with a child serving in the military, we know you have a heart to protect our military and to serve our nation._
_We believe your values and life experiences uniquely equip you to serve as this district’s next congressional representative._

_**FRC Action PAC is confident that you will be a dedicated advocate for limited government, for individual liberties, and for strong family values.** You are the leader that North Carolina needs, and we are pleased to offer our endorsement of your candidacy for Congress. Together we will create a culture in which human life is valued, families flourish, and religious liberty thrives._

_Sincerely,_
_Lt. Gen. (US Army-Ret.) William G. Boykin
Executive Vice President
Family Research Council Action PAC_

I know that freedom depends on values- and that in defense of our freedoms, our values will be the biggest weapon against the Socialists. Their vision is a hellscape; riots, murder by mob, no freedom, theft and destruction.

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gLkAJsrzQ3Nxmng&b=9p4elRTvDCFoJOrfVG0L3A)
---

Our vision is a prosperous, free people who are left to live their lives in peace.

**Our vision protects the most vulnerable among us, the unborn. **

_That's why I'm honored to have the endorsement of National Right to Life._ They have been fighting for the unborn for decades- and I hope to be as staunch ally of theirs in Congress!
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gLkAJsrzQ3Nxmng&b=dm1DWbBVERj0fygpr5cVlQ)
---
[If you share OUR vision for America, I need your help to change Congress and evict Pelosi!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gLkAJsrzQ3Nxmng&b=9p4elRTvDCFoJOrfVG0L3A)

**_I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi and her Socialist Squad! I have different values, American values, and together we will restore our Republic!_**

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gLkAJsrzQ3Nxmng&b=9p4elRTvDCFoJOrfVG0L3A), with your best and immediate contribution of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500.... or maybe even the Federal Maximum $2800 per person?

Taking out one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants is expensive, but it would be a major, crippling blow to the socialist anti-American left and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. _**Please rush back your supporting contribution today**_. Thank you.

G.K. Butterfield is a Swampy leftist, not a patriot, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gLkAJsrzQ3Nxmng&b=9p4elRTvDCFoJOrfVG0L3A). I appreciate you and thank you. Let's do this!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gLkAJsrzQ3Nxmng&b=9p4elRTvDCFoJOrfVG0L3A)
---

Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gLkAJsrzQ3Nxmng&b=9p4elRTvDCFoJOrfVG0L3A)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gLkAJsrzQ3Nxmng&b=9p4elRTvDCFoJOrfVG0L3A) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzsDMysbCwc) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzsDMysbCwc)

name: Warner HQ
subject: increasing turnout in November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

Team Warner is working hard to make sure Virginians are prepared to cast their ballots safely this November. This means getting as many folks across the Commonwealth registered to vote as we can -- high turnout could help Mark Warner and Democrats up and down the ballot.

This year, Election Day is going to look a little different. As we face a global pandemic, we know that Virginians are looking for ways to cast their ballots while keeping themselves and their loved ones safe. **That means the high turnout we need may come from folks casting no-excuse absentee ballots by mail.**

**[If you have the means, will you pitch in to help increase our voter registration and education efforts across the Commonwealth?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dba4/53d9897e/547709b4/1c8855d7/4282631455/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY2MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-safely?refcode=20200720_f_1_nd__661__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**

Virginia Democrats are embracing vote-by-mail: they cast more than 60,000 absentee ballots in last month's primary. We've got to keep that momentum going into November -- and we need your help, Derek. Right now, we're seeing that new voter registration is down across the Commonwealth. **Voter registration was a staggering 68% lower in May 2020 than it was in May 2016.**

We have the power to reverse this trend, but that means we need help from folks like you. Our team is working hard to make sure that every Virginian knows how they can cast their vote safely this November, because no one should have to choose between voting and protecting their health. **[Will you join us to help increase voting by mail in Virginia?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dba4/53d9897e/547709b4/1c8855d7/4282631455/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY2MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA clean_body: | | | Derek -- Team Warner is working hard to make sure Virginians are prepared to cast their ballots safely this November. This means getting as many folks across the Commonwealth registered to vote as we can -- high turnout could help Mark Warner and Democrats up and down the ballot. This year, Election Day is going to look a little different. As we face a global pandemic, we know that Virginians are looking for ways to cast their ballots while keeping themselves and their loved ones safe. That means the high turnout we need may come from folks casting no-excuse absentee ballots by mail. "" Virginia Democrats are embracing vote-by-mail: they cast more than 60,000 absentee ballots in last month's primary. We've got to keep that momentum going into November -- and we need your help, Derek. Right now, we're seeing that new voter registration is down across the Commonwealth. Voter registration was a staggering 68% lower in May 2020 than it was in May 2016. We have the power to reverse this trend, but that means we need help from folks like you. Our team is working hard to make sure that every Virginian knows how they can cast their vote safely this November, because no one should have to choose between voting and protecting their health. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" "" Thank you for your support! Together, we can keep the momentum going until November. Team Warner | "" | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

body:
| A Message From Amanda Makki For congress | |
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6f583b85fa1158c72e40ebde1&id=cba8794cf6&e=ee1c0329b3)
---
| | **American Conservative Union Endorses Frontrunner Amanda Makki** The American Conservative Union (ACU) has endorsed Amanda Makki’s campaign in Florida’s 13th Congressional race. __This endorsement speaks volumes to Amanda Makki’s tremendous grassroots momentum and financial power to unseat Charlie Crist.__ The American Conservative Union is the nation's oldest conservative grassroots organization and hosts The Conservative Political Action Conference (CPAC) each year. _“Amanda Makki’s powerful story of escaping religious persecution and immigrating to the United States is what the American Dream is all about,” said Chairman Matt Schlapp. “**Amanda’s remarkable drive and passion for working toward conservative policy solutions reflect the values and principles of the people of Florida’s 13th Congressional District.** She is determined to fight against socialism, cut regulations that stifle economic growth, and expand job opportunities for all._ **__ACU is proud to endorse Amanda Makki for Congress and urges everyone in Florida’s 13th Congressional District to vote for her in this election.”__**** _ _\- Matt Schlapp, Chairman American Conservative Union__** “I am humbled to receive such a prestigious endorsement. _Our campaign just hit the accelerator with the stamp of approval from one of the foundational organizations in the conservative movement_ ,” said Makki. “This endorsement ensures Pinellas voters that **a vote for** _Amanda Makki_ **is a vote to ensure a conservative counterpunch to the radical Left in Washington**. Our campaign is more motivated than ever to retire Charlie Crist!”
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6f583b85fa1158c72e40ebde1&id=7848527f78&e=ee1c0329b3)
---
| _Amanda has outraised all her primary opponents with over $1 million and is currently leading in the polls by 8 points. She is one of only 23 candidates nationwide to have earned NRCC Young Guns “Contender Status”, and her grassroots movement has amassed a vast list of conservative endorsements, including:_
* **House Republican Leader** **Kevin McCarthy**
* **Republican Whip** **Steve Scalise**
* **Congresswoman Elise Stefanik’s and E-PAC**
* **Senator Joni Ernst** , the first female combat veteran ever elected to the United States Senate
* **Congressmen** **Michael Waltz** (Lt. Colonel)
* **Congressman Neal Dunn **(Major)
* **Combat veteran** **Robert O’Neill** of the elite Navy SEAL Team 6, who shot Osama bin Laden
* **Florida State Representative** **Jamie Grant**
* **Seminole City Councilor** **Thom Barnhorn**
* **Treasure Island Commissioner** **Tyler Payne**
* **Belleair Beach Mayor** **Joseph Manzo**
* **Belleair Bluffs Mayor** **Chris Arbutine**
* **Treasure Island Mayor** **Larry Lunn**

_Please contribute now to Amanda Makki’s campaign to help flip this seat back to Republican control and to help her be one of the 17 candidates that will help take the gavel out of Nancy Pelosi’s hands and return the House back to Republican control this fall!_
---
| [CONTRIBUTE HERE](https://amandamakki.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6f583b85fa1158c72e40ebde1&id=f7917049b9&e=ee1c0329b3 "CONTRIBUTE HERE")

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Thank you
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Last week, I made the difficult decision to reduce parking capacity at Scarborough and Misquamicut State Beaches. That's not the kind of decision I make lightly. Our beaches are not only part of our shared Rhode Island identity, but they are also critical to the economies of our coastal communities. However, faced with overcrowded beaches and the threat of a spike like we're seeing around the country, we knew we had to act.
Today, I want to say thank you. Because of you, we saw a vast improvement in social distancing at our state beaches this past weekend.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-CeLtVpSbRLpEerFZS_QQ2lOALKMTj6HW1V9xHFEzIsbBoI8ymCqah19RJ9ojAupKg1Lnw1dSREkN3sNrfZh4miOw1lyQMWw-FSjQ4ggnBqDhkNFgbRRH0csZ-f3FX-H09eKq9wbttm5c2LNZ2oDBP6qdEs6dK5ZCIcKMrpIOXPWt378Psih96w93YvgSuqwP6TyXCKe91U=&c=fXFAyU9msk99tvIjRRLLG_iY5IgUAJls7BnBWuimZ1cJ3gwjPXTMSQ==&ch=n-we2-tdnCr5o-8RWFufvjTE6kCSOAR_yQtR1tjMkh0lFKFeOTFACg==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-CeLtVpSbRLpEerFZS_QQ2lOALKMTj6HW1V9xHFEzIsbBoI8ymCqah19RJ9ojAupKg1Lnw1dSREkN3sNrfZh4miOw1lyQMWw-FSjQ4ggnBqDhkNFgbRRH0csZ-f3FX-H09eKq9wbttm5c2LNZ2oDBP6qdEs6dK5ZCIcKMrpIOXPWt378Psih96w93YvgSuqwP6TyXCKe91U=&c=fXFAyU9msk99tvIjRRLLG_iY5IgUAJls7BnBWuimZ1cJ3gwjPXTMSQ==&ch=n-we2-tdnCr5o-8RWFufvjTE6kCSOAR_yQtR1tjMkh0lFKFeOTFACg==).
---
| Rhode Islanders stepped up this weekend and did a better job of following the rules at state beaches. Despite the heat, mask use was among the highest we've seen it all summer. I am deeply proud of every Rhode Islander who recognized the risks that this pandemic presents and took precautions to make their trip to the beach safe. I'm grateful to all the staff from the Department of Environmental Management and the Department of Health who stepped up this weekend to hand out masks at state beaches, and to local officials who partnered with us to help keep things under control. Most importantly, I want to thank the Rhode Islanders who made this possible by following the rules. This pandemic is incredibly difficult for all of us, but we are getting through it together. Still, we cannot let our guard down. We need to continue to wear masks, social distance, wash our hands frequently, and keep our groups small. The situation can change quickly, and we need to stay vigilant in order to stay ahead of this virus.
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-CeLtVpSbRLpEerFZS_QQ2lOALKMTj6HW1V9xHFEzIsbBoI8ymCqai_B9NH3fdPhfeNnTP7BFGNTZ0vyDwy500C9ycWZzfN27bMsNxpobqYOMw8Ah_Y5rTjdOZBrVplV-omd2roRyX5c_PcBYe58JeFuW5w0bTWeYCydCBRffjTNXx2WmRbtWYPQ4QGGBL10yUdv9sSFbVlTZvIPcudgUZwlveywhYbqO7-YRnmKhkyyPC7wNHE_LfSQ7SUG6vpPX8YT4ZHcnncGj86U0nfVN6H9BBfslLKo9Tz_Edgm2OsubHGT8__AdzNmdOZ37Xx1LmhL12c1hhwUrE_nn9ktE_c9kUuNYhTzDOzNosyr6bV4Rkxb6TA97nQkAyKRTPbG7QG9kEFgFVRPLzPXY9Twotb_xmcs7uk8gJ47Azpad7FDnnuQNOOiG3-uR3SEXvAZ&c=fXFAyU9msk99tvIjRRLLG_iY5IgUAJls7BnBWuimZ1cJ3gwjPXTMSQ==&ch=n-we2-tdnCr5o-8RWFufvjTE6kCSOAR_yQtR1tjMkh0lFKFeOTFACg==).

name: Team Christy
subject: Everyone is signing up to help, are you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Hey Peter,

Right now, we're all spending a lot of time at home.

But just because we're at home doesn't mean we can't connect with those around us.

Right now, we are ramping up our summer voter contact operation to make sure we are talking to voters early and often about Christy, and it all starts with our 100 Days Out Weekend of Action from July 25th to 26th. All we need is you!

**[If you're looking for some way to pass the time AND enact change, sign up to volunteer with Christy Smith for Congress!](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba98/29776869/91baaae/569ef290/202682505/VEsH/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSemXahZCaArZ_quAjGR9FhNspgmSRm-mJztt71z-hz5cpCIYw/viewform")** [MAKE CALLS FOR CHRISTY](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba98/29776869/91baaae/569ef290/202682505/VEsE/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSemXahZCaArZ_quAjGR9FhNspgmSRm-mJztt71z-hz5cpCIYw/viewform") Volunteering with this campaign might not seem possible during a pandemic. How in the world could Team Christy be asking you to go knock on doors during this time?

Well that's the thing, Peter: We're not.

We've completely shifted our voter outreach methods to a fully digital and remote platform. Volunteering for Christy is easy as picking up your phone. But instead of opening up Twitter or Instagram and going down a bad news spiral, you're getting the valuable opportunity to meet people who share your values and talk about why you want to elect Christy as CA-25's representative.

We'll teach you exactly how to best reach voters and make sure that by the end of your calls, you'll walk away knowing that you are the reason this movement is growing.

Sounds easy enough right?

**[Sign up right now to make calls for Christy and make a difference in your community without getting off the couch. And, if you phonebank with us twice in the next month, we'll even send you a Christy for Congress bumper sticker!](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba98/29776869/91baaae/569ef290/202682505/VEsF/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSemXahZCaArZ_quAjGR9FhNspgmSRm-mJztt71z-hz5cpCIYw/viewform")** [MAKE CALLS FOR CHRISTY](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba98/29776869/91baaae/569ef290/202682505/VEsC/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSemXahZCaArZ_quAjGR9FhNspgmSRm-mJztt71z-hz5cpCIYw/viewform") Talk to you soon!

\-- Team Christy

|
[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba98/29776869/91baaae/569ef291/202682505/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MjBfdm9sYXNrLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200720_volask-full")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors in Ventura and LA county on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this top pick-up House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba98/29776869/91baaae/569ef291/202682505/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MjBfdm9sYXNrLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200720_volask-full")
---

| | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress.
---|---
|

PO Box 301, 24307 Magic Mountain Pkwy, Valencia, CA 91355.

If you no longer want to hear from Christy Smith, [**click here to get off all our lists instantly.**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba98/29776869/91baaae/569ef293/202682505/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? name: [ALERT] - via Jon Ossoff HQ
subject: Friend, Trump is cutting the CDC out of the loop
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
COVID-19 data shouldn't be under White House control. |
---
Friend,

Donald Trump is playing politics with people's lives.

**During a crisis where the unfiltered guidance of nonpartisan infectious disease experts is vital, the Trump Administration last week ordered hospitals to BYPASS the Atlanta-based CDC and _send critical COVID-19 data directly to Washington instead_.**

**Important information about coronavirus infections shouldn't be under political control, where it can be manipulated for political gain and its credibility put in doubt.** _Without accurate information we cannot effectively fight COVID-19._

But a Senate controlled by Trump cronies like David Perdue -- Trump's first-term "co-pilot" and "favorite Senator" -- isn't about to stop him.

In a time of crisis, we need real leadership -- in the White House and in Congress.

Democratic Senate nominee Jon Ossoff believes CDC epidemiologists and the public should be guaranteed uncensored access to COVID-19 data. He will fight to keep doctors, and the public, fully informed.

**[Today, can you chip in $10 to Jon's surging campaign to oust David Perdue and take back the Senate?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e215d/5b2c1286/3da87313/25f1589e/1575140701/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_18_cdcfr?refcode=em_2020_07_20_cdcfr&amount=10&amounts=10,25,100,500,750,1000,2800")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Photos: First Lady delivers lunch to first responders
body:
First Lady Melania Trump, in an unannounced visit last week, dropped by Engine Company 9 fire station in Washington, D.C., to deliver lunch for... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7058e66ca7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • July 20, 2020
---
| | |
# **Photos: First Lady delivers lunch to first responders**

**First Lady Melania Trump,** in an unannounced visit last week, dropped by Engine Company 9 fire station in Washington, D.C., to deliver lunch for first responders.

**“Your work is essential** to keeping our citizens & youth safe, & proof that we must work together to build stronger connections between first responders & communities,” the First Lady tweeted.

🎬 [WATCH: First Lady brings lunch to Engine Company 9](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=219bf2bff2&e=3ee4985eea)

**Along with lunch** , the First Lady also dropped off tote bags, reusable face masks, and hand sanitizer. She talked with firefighters, Emergency Medical Service (EMS) personnel, and police officers from the D.C. Metropolitan Police Department’s Third District.

**“The President and I** will continue to support our dedicated firefighters, police members, EMS personnel and other critical first responders who put their lives at risk each day in order to keep our neighborhoods safe," the First Lady said.

**“We are grateful** for their teamwork, professionalism and courage, and the vital role they play in communities throughout the country.”

[IN PHOTOS: First Lady meets with members of DC Fire, EMS, and Police](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ba89e356d6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump briefs Americans from Oval Office**

**President Trump **joined Vice President Mike Pence, Treasury Secretary Steven Mnuchin, Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell, and House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy in the Oval Office this morning to brief Americans about additional Coronavirus relief and progress toward a vaccine.

🎬 [**President Trump: Rapid progress on a vaccine and therapeutics**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ece4949ca1&e=3ee4985eea)

**The focus** is “really about kids and jobs and vaccines,” Secretary Mnuchin said. “We’re going to make sure that we have a vaccine by the end of the year for emergency use.”

**Vice President Pence** reiterated that the best way to help Americans is to make sure that schools and businesses can safely reopen soon.

**“We’ll make sure** our healthcare workers and our states have the resources that they need. But also, Mr. President, we’re going to continue to advance policies that’ll make it possible for us to open up America again and open up America’s schools.”

**The historic, nationwide** ramp-up to fight Coronavirus—which includes the largest mobilization of U.S. industry since World War II—is making America a global leader in addressing the pandemic. Thanks to President Trump’s efforts to accelerate ventilator production, for example, the United States now has a surplus of these crucial machines.

**“We’re helping the world** with ventilators. We’re helping a lot of countries,” the President said.

[WATCH: We’re doing “whatever it takes” to assist Americans, Vice President says](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a6b7881c81&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump and Vice President Pence meet with ****House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy, Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell, Treasury Secretary Steven Mnuchin, and White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows** | July 20, 2020
---
|

name: Joe Biden
subject: I'd like to humbly ask you to do something today to help us win this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
The character of our country is on the ballot this year. |
---
Hey Peter,

I don't have to tell you that this is a pivotal time for our nation and for the entire planet, and that there is so much work we have to do to win this election and defeat Donald Trump in November.

But it's about more than just winning an election. The character of our country is on the ballot this year.

We have an obligation to change this country for everyone -- to come together as Americans to solve the challenges ahead of us.

It really is a battle for the soul of our nation -- but the thing about battles is that they are not won alone. You are a critical part of this fight.

**So I'd like to humbly ask you to do something today to help us win this race and defeat Donald Trump, if you 're able.**
