name: Bill Olson
subject: If the GOP doesn't win, Seattle is your future
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3TJVrL7HF6OuRU&b=O6CN.ZPQq341EIx3u.Izjg

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I need your help to restore sanity to Congress!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3TJVrL7HF6OuRU&b=O6CN.ZPQq341EIx3u.Izjg

There have been so many really disturbing things we have seen around the country over the last few weeks.

Innocent people attacked and killed, statues torn down, businesses looted, and chaos reigning in Democrat-run cities where police are being clearly scapegoated.

But of all of them, Seattle is the most disturbing of the lot!

-It started with Seattle allowing a bunch of rioters to take over their downtown and establish their own separate country, the "CHAZ". They didn't let police in, armed warlords eventually took over and proceeded to attack and brutalize people, eventually leading (predictably) to murders and the police takeover of the CHAZ.

-Seattle is one of the few places with avowed, open Socialists on its city council. They are openly calling for revolution:

Seattle City Councilwoman Kshama Sawant delivers a message after passing the "Amazon Tax" at a digital city council meeting on Monday.

"I have a message for Jeff Bezos and his class," Sawant warned. "If you attempt again to overturn the Amazon Tax, working people will go all out in the thousands to beat you. And we will not stop there."

"You see, we are fighting for far more than this tax," Sawant continued. "We are preparing the ground for a different kind of society, and if you, Jeff Bezos, want to drive that process forward by lashing out against us in our modest demands, then so be it. Because we are coming for you and your rotten system. We are coming to dismantle this deeply oppressive, racist, sexist, violent, utterly bankrupt system of capitalism. This police state. We cannot and will not stop until we overthrow it, and replace it with a world based, instead, on solidarity, genuine democracy, and equality: a socialist world. Thank you."

-Now, the Seattle City Council is talking about defunding the police 50%! To do that, they would have to fire cops; and they apparently only want to fire the white ones, in the most blatant act of government-sponsored bigotry in 150 years:

The problem is that the firing would be done by seniority and many of the less senior officers are black. The solution according to City Council member Lisa Herbold is simple: fire officers based on their race. While that would be the definition of racial discrimination, Herbold clearly believes that it is discrimination for a good cause. The federal courts are likely to disagree. Most notably, Herbold’s call for racial discrimination against white officers would seek to undue the work of Justice Thurgood Marshall who insisted that racial discrimination unlawful and evil regardless of the race you want to disenfranchise or discriminate against.

Finally, the institutionalized bigotry by the City of Seattle also includes guilt-imposing brainwashing for white people (not making this up):

The City of Seattle’s Office of Civil Rights hosted a racially segregated employee training session for the city’s white staff last month to instruct them on how to address their inescapable complicity in a system of white supremacy, including ways to “undo their whiteness.”

City Journal Editor Christopher F. Rufo used public record requests to investigate what the two and a half hour session, titled “Interrupting Internalized Racial Superiority and Whiteness,” entailed.

What he found was a program designed for white people to better understand their “complicity in the system of white supremacy and interrupt racism in ways that are accountable to Black, Indigenous and People of Color.” The training was based on the idea that all white people have a natural “implicit bias,” for which they must actively reorient their mindset and actions to overcome.

The curriculum began with the basic instruction that white people have by virtue of their skin color, naturally internalized a sense of racial superiority. Rufo said this superiority, according to the programming, makes white people unable to act in a humane way, inevitably oppressing people of color.

The real problem is this: don't think this will be limited to Seattle.

Unless we stop these nutty Stalinist bigots now, this will be the future of every American city.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3TJVrL7HF6OuRU&b=O6CN.ZPQq341EIx3u.Izjg

Government-sponsored bigotry. Government enforced brainwashing, based on skin color. Abolishing the police. Specific taxes punishing big employers.

This Maoist dystopia is Seattle, today; and it will be America, tomorrow- unless we do something RIGHT NOW!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3TJVrL7HF6OuRU&b=O6CN.ZPQq341EIx3u.Izjg

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3TJVrL7HF6OuRU&b=O6CN.ZPQq341EIx3u.Izjg

The above was a handout at the government-sponsored racial brainwashing session, put on by the City of Seattle.

This garbage isn't legal, it isn't Constitutional, and is hard-line Communism- this isn't the America ANY of us know! We must fight now or our country and our freedoms will be lost. Will you stand with me

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3TJVrL7HF6OuRU&b=O6CN.ZPQq341EIx3u.Izjg
?

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3TJVrL7HF6OuRU&b=O6CN.ZPQq341EIx3u.Izjg

It's hard to believe, but the barbaric abuses of government in Seattle is actually what the Dems in Congress, led by AOC and Ilhan Omar, advocate. That's why it's important to stand up for America- right now!

Now, I'm not a slick fundraiser or polished politician. I'm just a career soldier who has fought for our country and taken an oath to the Constitution! I don't have Pelosi's Swampy millions, which is why I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3TJVrL7HF6OuRU&b=O6CN.ZPQq341EIx3u.Izjg

I need your help today- to replace Socialist Darren Soto, defend America and support the President!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST Communism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3TJVrL7HF6OuRU&b=O6CN.ZPQq341EIx3u.Izjg

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3TJVrL7HF6OuRU&b=O6CN.ZPQq341EIx3u.Izjg
Florida is crucial for the Republicans. It's now the President's home state, with many swing districts like mine that we can flip!

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3TJVrL7HF6OuRU&b=O6CN.ZPQq341EIx3u.Izjg
of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple?

I appreciate whatever you can send so we can defeat Socialist Darren Soto and stop America from becoming Seattle!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3TJVrL7HF6OuRU&b=O6CN.ZPQq341EIx3u.Izjg

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3TJVrL7HF6OuRU&b=O6CN.ZPQq341EIx3u.Izjg

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3TJVrL7HF6OuRU&b=O6CN.ZPQq341EIx3u.Izjg
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3TJVrL7HF6OuRU&b=O6CN.ZPQq341EIx3u.Izjg
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

Marlton NJ 08053

I appreciate whatever you can send so we can defeat Socialist Darren Soto and stop America from becoming Seattle! I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats lose BIG this year - with your help! Let's get this done! Image Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter Image P.S. I really need your help today , so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP! name: Voting Rights Alert
subject: Ruth Bader Ginsburg re: the VRA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Georgia is now ground zero for voter suppression.
| | |
---
| | **BREAKING via _The Nation_ : "Georgia is now ground zero for voter suppression." **
---
**[Your signature missing: Add your name now to demand Congress restore the Voting Rights Act!](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/warnock-vra?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-vra%3Fcode%3Djtk385-su-nd")**
---
| | [ADD MY NAME ->](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/warnock-vra?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-vra%3Fcode%3Djtk385-su-nd")
---
Friend,

When the Supreme Court gutted the Voting Rights Act in 2013, Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg wrote in her dissenting opinion that doing so was like "throwing away your umbrella in a rainstorm because you are not getting wet." **And last month, the people of Georgia got** _**drenched.**_

Primary voters across the state were forced to wait in line for hours - in some cases only to be turned away because of faulty machines or too few ballots. It was just the latest example of Republicans trying to suppress the vote, buy this election and cling to power.
The VRA, signed in 1965 during the civil rights movement, made discriminatory voting practices illegal and ensured that Black Americans and other voters of color weren't blocked from the ballot box. And it worked.
But the _fact_ that voter disenfranchisement decreased so greatly after the VRA was signed made some on the Supreme Court think that the voter protection law wasn't necessary anymore, and they gutted the VRA in a 5-4 decision in 2013. This gave states - especially those with a history of racial voter suppression - free rein to enact strict voter ID laws, purge voter rolls, shut down polling stations and more.
**Voting is a right - not a privilege the GOP can revoke whenever it fears losing power. But if we're going to fight back against Republican attacks and protect voting rights for all, we need to restore the VRA - and we need Democrats like you to speak out right now.**
**[Please, friend, don't let your voice be silenced: Will you be one of the 10,000 people we need to demand Congress restore the Voting Rights Act and protect voting rights for every American? This petition is closing at midnight, but you still haven't signed.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/warnock-vra?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-vra%3Fcode%3Djtk385-su-nd")**
| | [ADD MY NAME FOR VOTING RIGHTS ->](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/warnock-vra?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-vra%3Fcode%3Djtk385-su-nd")
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5b4/288179be/9955dbf/348e7a07/4193129785/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. name: Tom Cotton
subject: The anti-American 1619 Project in our schools?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
I need to alert you about an appalling, anti-American propaganda effort. It's called the "1619 project" and it's being led by liberal activists at the New York Times. This project is an effort to change curriculum in schools across America to teach our kids that the real founding of America wasn't in 1776—it was in 1619 when the first slaves arrived in America. The thesis of the project is that everything that America has ever done has been in support of racism and that America is a fundamentally wicked country.Click here to unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=43001061&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTUyNDY3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwMDEwNjES1&kn=10&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMTUyNDY3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

I need to alert you about an anti-American propaganda campaign. It's called the "1619 Project" and it's being led by liberal activists at the New York Times.

This project is an effort to change curriculum in schools across America to teach our kids that the real founding of America wasn't in 1776—it was in 1619 when the first slaves arrived. The thesis of the project is that everything that America has ever done has been in support of racism and that America is a fundamentally wicked country.

This is nonsense. The entire argument of the 1619 Project has already been debunked. You can read about it here http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwMDEwNjES1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMTUyNDY3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0.

>From the Federalist:

In the original version the 1619 Project falsely claimed maintaining slavery was a primary motivation of colonists in revolting against England.

That claim was resoundingly rejected as inaccurate and. Now, the 1619 Project reads that it was a primary motivation for “some of” the colonists.

Even though this project has been shown to be historically illiterate, the liberal mob is not giving up in its quest to rewrite American history. The mob is even citing the 1619 Project when they tear down statues of George Washington and Ulysses Grant.
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwMDEwNjES1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMTUyNDY3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0
And now, these far-Left radicals are trying to force this same anti-American 1619 propaganda into our schools. All of our kids will be taught that the only distinguishing feature of America is not our liberty, our fight against tyranny, or our work defeating fascism—it's that we are all racists.

This is a lie. America is the greatest country the world has ever seen. We liberated the world from tyranny, and we have created opportunities for hundreds of millions to pursue life, liberty, and happiness.

Peter, I want to get this anti-American trash out of our schools. Do you agree with me?

If so, SIGN HERE http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwMDEwNjES1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMTUyNDY3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0.

We can't just wait and let the Marxists propagandize our children. It's already bad enough, but if the 1619 Project becomes the norm, it will get worse.

SIGN MY PETITION TO TAKE THE 1619 PROJECT OUT OF OUR SCHOOLS http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwMDEwNjES1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMTUyNDY3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0 In service,

Tom Cotton
Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Defeating Joni Ernst in Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Theresa Greenfield is running against Republican Joni Ernst. The polls show that this will be one of the most competitive Senate elections of the year. We can win -- but only if we fight by Theresa Gr | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250fe/45c30650/1cc894609/66e877be/2659305266/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
You know what I've seen every time I've gone to Iowa?

I've seen people who are sick and tired of Washington corruption. Sick and tired of politicians who go to D.C. and rig the rules to benefit the wealthy and well-connected. Sick and tired of a government that only works for a thin slice at the top.

Iowans are ready to fight for the bold reforms we need -- and they're ready to elect our Democratic Senate nominee, Theresa Greenfield, this November.

**Theresa Greenfield is running against Republican Joni Ernst. The polls show that this will be one of the most competitive Senate elections of the year. We can win -- but only if we fight by Theresa Greenfield's side and build a grassroots movement.**

**[If it makes sense for you right now, can you chip in $2 or more to support Theresa Greenfield's Senate campaign and Warren Democrats? Your donation would help flip this Senate seat and root corruption out of Washington.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250fe/45c30650/1cc894609/66e877a1/2659305266/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXRnIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQxM0ZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNzIwX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-tg?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT13F_EGR_END_E_20200720_V1S2_P")**

Theresa Greenfield is a businesswoman, a mother of four, and a scrappy farm kid who knows the struggles working Iowans are facing right now.

After growing up on her family farm, she put herself through school, relied on Social Security and union benefits after her first husband died, and eventually rose to run a small business.

Her life has been defined by hard work, determination, and resolve. And I'm honored to stand shoulder to shoulder with her in the fight to take on the corporate special interests in Washington, end political corruption, and put working people first.

Meanwhile, her opponent, Joni Ernst, has voted to rip health care away from millions of families, slash taxes for the richest Americans and the biggest corporations, and rubber-stamp Donald Trump's Supreme Court nominees.

**Let's replace Joni Ernst with Theresa Greenfield. Let's win this Senate race in Iowa -- together.**

**[Please, if you're in a place to make a financial contribution, split a donation between Theresa Greenfield's campaign and ours today.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250fe/45c30650/1cc894609/66e877a1/2659305266/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXRnIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQxM0ZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNzIwX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-tg?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT13F_EGR_END_E_20200720_V1S2_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250fe/45c30650/1cc894609/66e877a1/2659305266/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXRnIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQxM0ZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNzIwX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-tg?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT13F_EGR_END_E_20200720_V1S2_P")
